TeraXLang IR Viewer Help

Overview

This tool shows the binding between IR code (PTX) and Python source code. Click on any line to navigate between related code.

Navigation

  • Click PTX line → Highlights and scrolls to bound Python lines
  • Click Python line → Highlights and scrolls to bound PTX lines

Color Legend

  • ■ Green - PTX line has Python binding
  • ■ Orange - Python line has PTX binding
  • ■ Purple - Both have bindings

Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Click + Hold - Highlight multiple lines
  • Escape - Clear all highlights

8295 .file 1 "/usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/flash_attn/cute/flash_fwd_sm100.py"
8296 ␀
Python /workspace/fa4/flash_attn_local/cute/flash_fwd_sm100.py
1 # Supported features:
2 # - BF16 & FP16 dtype
3 # - noncausal & causal attention
4 # - MHA, GQA, MQA
5 # - hdim 64, 96, 128, (192, 128).
6 # - varlen
7 # - sliding window
8 # - split-kv
9 # Unsupported features that will be added later:
10 # - page size != 128
11 # - more hdim (192, 256)
12 # Based on the cutlass example and cute-dsl example:
13 # https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/tree/main/examples/77_blackwell_fmha
14 # https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/blob/main/examples/python/CuTeDSL/blackwell/fmha.py
15
16 import enum
17 import math
18 from typing import Type, Tuple, Callable, Optional, Literal
19 from functools import partial
20
21 import cuda.bindings.driver as cuda
22
23 import cutlass
24 import cutlass.cute as cute
25 from cutlass import Float32, Int32, Int64, Boolean, const_expr
26 from cutlass.cute.nvgpu import cpasync
27 import cutlass.cute.nvgpu.tcgen05 as tcgen05
28 import cutlass.utils.blackwell_helpers as sm100_utils_basic
29 from cutlass import pipeline
30 from cutlass.pipeline import pipeline_init_arrive, pipeline_init_wait
31 from cutlass.base_dsl.arch import Arch
32 from cutlass.cutlass_dsl import BaseDSL
33
34 from quack import copy_utils, layout_utils
35
36 from flash_attn.cute.paged_kv import PagedKVManager
37 from flash_attn.cute.cute_dsl_utils import assume_tensor_aligned
38 import flash_attn.cute.pipeline as pipeline_custom
39 from flash_attn.cute.mask import AttentionMask
40 from flash_attn.cute.softmax import SoftmaxSm100, apply_score_mod_inner
41 from flash_attn.cute.seqlen_info import SeqlenInfoQK
42 from flash_attn.cute.block_info import BlockInfo
43 from flash_attn.cute.block_sparsity import BlockSparseTensors
44 from flash_attn.cute.block_sparse_utils import (
45 get_total_block_count,
46 produce_block_sparse_loads_sm100,
47 softmax_block_sparse_sm100,
48 handle_block_sparse_empty_tile_correction_sm100,
49 )
50 from flash_attn.cute.pack_gqa import PackGQA
51 from flash_attn.cute import mma_sm100_desc as sm100_desc
52 from flash_attn.cute import blackwell_helpers as sm100_utils
53 from cutlass.cute import FastDivmodDivisor
54 from quack.cute_dsl_utils import ParamsBase
55 from flash_attn.cute.tile_scheduler import (
56 TileSchedulerArguments,
57 SingleTileScheduler,
58 StaticPersistentTileScheduler,
59 SingleTileLPTScheduler,
60 SingleTileVarlenScheduler,
61 )
62
63
64 class NamedBarrierFwd(enum.IntEnum):
65 Epilogue = enum.auto() # starts from 1 as barrier 0 is reserved for sync_threads()
66 TmemPtr = enum.auto()
67 SoftmaxStatsW0 = enum.auto()
68 SoftmaxStatsW1 = enum.auto()
69 SoftmaxStatsW2 = enum.auto()
70 SoftmaxStatsW3 = enum.auto()
71 SoftmaxStatsW4 = enum.auto()
72 SoftmaxStatsW5 = enum.auto()
73 SoftmaxStatsW6 = enum.auto()
74 SoftmaxStatsW7 = enum.auto()
75
76
77 # WarpSchedulerWG1 = enum.auto()
78 # WarpSchedulerWG2 = enum.auto()
79
80
81 class FlashAttentionForwardSm100:
82 def __init__(
83 self,
84 # dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
85 head_dim: int,
86 head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
87 qhead_per_kvhead: cutlass.Constexpr[int] = 1,
88 is_causal: bool = False,
89 is_local: bool = False,
90 is_split_kv: bool = False,
91 pack_gqa: bool = False,
92 q_subtile_factor: int | None = None,
93 m_block_size: int = 128,
94 n_block_size: int = 128,
95 q_stage: cutlass.Constexpr[int] = 2,
96 is_persistent: bool = True,
97 score_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
98 mask_mod: cutlass.Constexpr | None = None,
99 has_aux_tensors: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
100 paged_kv_non_tma: bool = False,
101 is_varlen_q: bool = False,
102 use_2cta_instrs: bool = False,
103 ):
104 self.use_tma_KV = not paged_kv_non_tma
105 # self.dtype = dtype
106 # padding head_dim to a multiple of 16 as k_block_size
107 hdim_multiple_of = 16
108 self.head_dim_padded = int(
109 math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
110 )
111 head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
112 self.same_hdim_kv = head_dim == head_dim_v
113 self.head_dim_v_padded = int(
114 math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
115 )
116 self.same_hdim_kv_padded = self.head_dim_padded == self.head_dim_v_padded
117 self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.head_dim_padded
118 self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.head_dim_v_padded
119 self.m_block_size = m_block_size
120 self.n_block_size = n_block_size
121 self.q_stage = q_stage
122 assert self.q_stage in [1, 2]
123 self.use_2cta_instrs = use_2cta_instrs
124 # If split_P_arrive, the softmax warps write some columns of P first, signal to the MMA warp
125 # to being the P @ V MMA, then write the rest of P and signal again. This allows some overlap
126 # between compute the last couple columns of P and the P @ V MMA.
127 self.split_P_arrive = n_block_size // 4 * 3
128 self.split_P_arrive = int(self.split_P_arrive / 32) * 32 # multiple of 32
129 assert self.split_P_arrive % 32 == 0
130 assert self.split_P_arrive < self.n_block_size
131 self.arch = BaseDSL._get_dsl().get_arch_enum()
132 assert self.arch >= Arch.sm_100 and self.arch <= Arch.sm_110f, (
133 "Only SM 10.x and 11.x are supported"
134 )
135
136 self.cta_group_size = 2 if self.use_2cta_instrs else 1
137 # cta_tiler M includes only 1 CTA, the scheduler will take into account the cluster shape
138 self.cta_tiler = (
139 self.q_stage * m_block_size,
140 n_block_size,
141 self.head_dim_padded,
142 )
143 # With 2CTA, the MMA tiler M covers both CTAs, so it's cta_group_size * m_block_size.
144 # Each CTA owns m_block_size rows; the 2CTA MMA instruction spans both.
145 self.mma_tiler_qk = (
146 self.cta_group_size * m_block_size,
147 n_block_size,
148 self.head_dim_padded,
149 )
150 self.mma_tiler_pv = (
151 self.cta_group_size * m_block_size,
152 self.head_dim_v_padded,
153 n_block_size,
154 )
155 self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
156 self.pv_acc_dtype = Float32
157 self.cluster_shape_mn = (2, 1) if self.use_2cta_instrs else (1, 1)
158 self.is_persistent = is_persistent
159 self.is_causal = is_causal
160 self.is_local = is_local
161 self.is_varlen_q = is_varlen_q
162 self.use_correction_warps_for_epi = is_varlen_q
163 self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
164 self.is_split_kv = is_split_kv
165 self.pack_gqa = pack_gqa
166 self.q_subtile_factor = q_subtile_factor
167 if pack_gqa:
168 assert m_block_size % self.qhead_per_kvhead == 0, (
169 "For PackGQA, m_block_size must be divisible by qhead_per_kvhead"
170 )
171 assert not (self.is_split_kv and self.head_dim_v_padded >= 192), (
172 "SplitKV is not supported for hdim >= 192"
173 )
174 self.score_mod = score_mod
175 self.mask_mod = mask_mod
176 self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = getattr(
177 score_mod, "__vec_size__", 1 if cutlass.const_expr(has_aux_tensors) else 2
178 )
179 # Does S1 need to wait for S0 to finish
180 # self.s0_s1_barrier = self.head_dim_padded in [64, 96] and (not self.is_causal and not self.is_local)
181 is_sm103 = self.arch >= Arch.sm_103 and self.arch <= Arch.sm_103f
182 # self.enable_ex2_emu = self.head_dim_padded <= 128 and not is_sm103
183 self.enable_ex2_emu = (
184 self.head_dim_padded <= 128
185 or (
186 self.head_dim_padded == 192
187 and self.use_2cta_instrs
188 and not self.is_causal
189 and not self.is_local
190 )
191 ) and not is_sm103
192 self.s0_s1_barrier = False
193 self.overlap_sO_sQ = (
194 self.head_dim_padded == 192 and self.head_dim_v_padded >= 64
195 ) or (self.head_dim_v_padded >= 128 and self.is_split_kv)
196 if self.overlap_sO_sQ:
197 self.is_persistent = False
198
199 assert self.use_tma_KV or not (self.check_hdim_oob or self.check_hdim_v_oob), (
200 "Paged KV does not support irregular head dim"
201 )
202
203 self.softmax0_warp_ids = (0, 1, 2, 3)
204 self.softmax1_warp_ids = (4, 5, 6, 7)
205 self.correction_warp_ids = (8, 9, 10, 11)
206 self.mma_warp_id = 12
207 self.epilogue_warp_ids = (13,)
208 self.load_warp_ids = (14,)
209 self.empty_warp_ids = (15,)
210 self.tmem_alloc_cols = cute.arch.get_max_tmem_alloc_cols("sm_100")
211
212 self.threads_per_cta = cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(
213 (
214 *self.softmax0_warp_ids,
215 *self.softmax1_warp_ids,
216 *self.correction_warp_ids,
217 self.mma_warp_id,
218 *self.load_warp_ids,
219 *self.epilogue_warp_ids,
220 *self.empty_warp_ids,
221 )
222 )
223
224 if self.q_stage == 1:
225 if not self.use_tma_KV:
226 self.empty_warp_ids = self.empty_warp_ids + self.load_warp_ids
227 self.load_warp_ids = self.softmax1_warp_ids
228 else:
229 self.empty_warp_ids = self.empty_warp_ids + self.softmax1_warp_ids
230 self.softmax1_warp_ids = ()
231 elif not self.use_tma_KV:
232 self.load_warp_ids = (14, 15)
233 self.empty_warp_ids = ()
234
235 if self.use_correction_warps_for_epi:
236 self.empty_warp_ids = self.empty_warp_ids + self.epilogue_warp_ids
237 self.epilogue_warp_ids = self.correction_warp_ids
238 elif self.is_varlen_q: # fallback
239 self.epilogue_warp_ids = (13, 14)
240
241 self.tmem_s_offset = [0, self.n_block_size] # e.g., 0, 128
242 self.tmem_o_offset = [
243 self.tmem_s_offset[-1] + self.n_block_size + i * self.head_dim_v_padded
244 for i in range(self.q_stage)
245 ] # e.g., 256, 384
246 self.tmem_total = self.tmem_o_offset[-1] + self.head_dim_v_padded
247 assert self.tmem_total <= self.tmem_alloc_cols
248 self.tmem_s_to_p_offset = self.n_block_size // 2
249 self.tmem_p_offset = [
250 self.tmem_s_offset[i] + self.tmem_s_to_p_offset for i in range(2)
251 ] # 0, 128
252
253 # vec buffer for row_max & row_sum
254 self.tmem_vec_offset = self.tmem_s_offset
255
256 if self.head_dim_padded < 96:
257 self.num_regs_softmax = 200 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 184
258 self.num_regs_correction = 64
259 self.num_regs_other = 48 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 80
260 else:
261 # self.num_regs_softmax = 192 if self.is_causal or self.is_local else 184
262 if not self.enable_ex2_emu:
263 self.num_regs_softmax = 192 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 184
264 else:
265 # self.num_regs_softmax = 200 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 184
266 self.num_regs_softmax = 192 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 184
267 # self.num_regs_softmax = 176
268 # self.num_regs_correction = 96
269 # self.num_regs_correction = 64 if self.is_causal or self.is_local else 80
270 if not self.enable_ex2_emu:
271 self.num_regs_correction = 80 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 64
272 else:
273 # self.num_regs_correction = 64
274 self.num_regs_correction = 80 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 64
275 # self.num_regs_other = 32
276 # self.num_regs_other = 64
277 # self.num_regs_other = 80
278 self.num_regs_other = 48 if not paged_kv_non_tma else 80
279 # self.num_regs_other = 96 if self.is_causal or self.is_local else 80
280 # self.num_regs_other = 64 if self.is_causal or self.is_local else 80
281
282 self.buffer_align_bytes = 1024
283
284 def _setup_attributes(self):
285 """Set up configurations and parameters for the FMHA kernel operation.
286
287 This method initializes and configures various attributes required for the
288 execution of the fused multi-head attention kernel, mainly about the pipeline stages:
289
290 - Sets up staging parameters for Q, K, V inputs and accumulator data
291 - Configures pipeline stages for softmax, correction, and epilogue operations
292 """
293
294 smem_size_q = (
295 self.q_stage
296 * self.m_block_size
297 * self.head_dim_padded
298 * self.q_dtype.width
299 // 8
300 )
301 smem_size_o = (
302 self.q_stage
303 * self.m_block_size
304 * self.head_dim_v_padded
305 * self.o_dtype.width
306 // 8
307 )
308 smem_size_q_o = (
309 smem_size_q + smem_size_o
310 if not self.overlap_sO_sQ
311 else max(smem_size_q, smem_size_o)
312 )
313 smem_size_k_per_stage = (
314 self.n_block_size * self.head_dim_padded * self.k_dtype.width // 8
315 )
316 smem_size_v_per_stage = (
317 self.n_block_size * self.head_dim_v_padded * self.v_dtype.width // 8
318 )
319 smem_size_kv_per_stage = (
320 max(smem_size_k_per_stage, smem_size_v_per_stage) // self.cta_group_size
321 )
322 kv_stage = (224 * 1024 - smem_size_q_o) // smem_size_kv_per_stage
323 if (
324 self.head_dim_padded == 192
325 and self.head_dim_v_padded == 128
326 and kv_stage == 2
327 ):
328 # For hdim 192,128, we can fit 3 stages if we use uneven_kv_smem
329 kv_stage = 3
330 self.kv_stage = kv_stage
331 # print("kv_stage", self.kv_stage)
332 self.s_stage = 2
333 assert self.s_stage >= self.q_stage
334 # For hdim 192,128 1CTA, we don't have enough smem to store all 3 stages of KV:
335 # 128 x 192 x 2 bytes x 3 stages = 144KB, and we need 96KB for Q.
336 # Instead we store smem as [smem_large, smem_small, smem_large], where smem_large is
337 # 128 x 192 and smem_small is 128 x 128. We set the stride between the stages to be
338 # 128 * 160, so that indexing the 0th and 2nd stages will get the right address,
339 # but for the 1st stage we need to add or subtract (depending on phase) 128 x 64.
340 self.uneven_kv_smem = (
341 self.head_dim_padded == 192
342 and self.head_dim_v_padded == 128
343 and self.kv_stage == 3
344 )
345 self.uneven_kv_smem_offset = (
346 self.m_block_size * (self.head_dim_padded - self.head_dim_v_padded) // 2
347 if self.uneven_kv_smem
348 else 0
349 )
350 assert self.uneven_kv_smem_offset % 1024 == 0
351
352 @cute.jit
353 def __call__(
354 self,
355 mQ: cute.Tensor, # (b, s_q, h, d) or (total_q, h, d) if there is cu_seqlens_q
356 mK: cute.Tensor, # (b_k, s_k, h_k, d) or (total_k, h_k, d) if there is cu_seqlens_k or (num_pages, page_size, h_k, d) if there is page_table
357 mV: cute.Tensor, # (b_k, s_k, h_k, dv) or (total_k, h_k, dv) if there is cu_seqlens_k or (num_pages, page_size, h_k, dv) if there is page_table
358 mO: cute.Tensor, # (b, s_q, h, dv) or (total_q, h, dv) if there is cu_seqlens_q
359 mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
360 softmax_scale: Float32,
361 stream: cuda.CUstream,
362 mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
363 mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
364 mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
365 mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
366 mPageTable: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None, # (b_k, max_num_pages_per_seq)
367 window_size_left: Int32 | int | None = None,
368 window_size_right: Int32 | int | None = None,
369 learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
370 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
371 aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
372 ):
373 """Execute the Fused Multi-Head Attention operation on the provided tensors.
374
375 This method prepares the input tensors for processing, validates their shapes and types,
376 configures the computation parameters, and launches the CUDA kernel.
377
378 The method handles:
379 1. Tensor layout transformations for specific memory access patterns
380 2. Validation of tensor shapes and data types
381 3. Initialization of hardware-specific parameters and memory layouts
382 4. Configuration of TMA (Tensor Memory Access) operations
383 5. Grid and work scheduling computation
384 6. Kernel launch with appropriate parameters
385 """
386 # setup static attributes before smem/grid/tma computation
387 print("Local called")
388 self.q_dtype = mQ.element_type
389 self.k_dtype = mK.element_type
390 self.v_dtype = mV.element_type
391 self.o_dtype = mO.element_type
392 mQ, mK, mV, mO = [assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO)]
393 Q_layout_transpose = (
394 [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [0, 2, 1]
395 )
396 mQ = cute.make_tensor(
397 mQ.iterator, cute.select(mQ.layout, mode=Q_layout_transpose)
398 )
399 # (s_k, d, h_k, b_k) or (total_k, d, h_k) if there's cu_seqlens_k or (page_size, d, h_k, num_pages) if there's page_table
400 KV_layout_transpose = (
401 [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None) else [0, 2, 1]
402 )
403 mK, mV = [
404 cute.make_tensor(
405 t.iterator, cute.select(t.layout, mode=KV_layout_transpose)
406 )
407 for t in (mK, mV)
408 ]
409 if const_expr(self.is_split_kv):
410 O_layout_transpose = (
411 [2, 4, 3, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [1, 3, 2, 0]
412 )
413 LSE_layout_transpose = (
414 [3, 2, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [2, 1, 0]
415 )
416 num_splits = mO.shape[0]
417 else:
418 O_layout_transpose = (
419 [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [0, 2, 1]
420 )
421 LSE_layout_transpose = (
422 [2, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [1, 0]
423 )
424 num_splits = Int32(1)
425 mO = cute.make_tensor(
426 mO.iterator, cute.select(mO.layout, mode=O_layout_transpose)
427 )
428 mLSE = (
429 cute.make_tensor(
430 mLSE.iterator, cute.select(mLSE.layout, mode=LSE_layout_transpose)
431 )
432 if const_expr(mLSE is not None)
433 else None
434 )
435 # (s, d, h, b) -> (d, s, h, b)
436 V_layout_transpose = (
437 [1, 0, 2, 3] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None) else [1, 0, 2]
438 )
439 mV = cute.make_tensor(
440 mV.iterator, cute.select(mV.layout, mode=V_layout_transpose)
441 )
442
443 # check type consistency
444 if const_expr(self.q_dtype != self.k_dtype):
445 raise TypeError(f"Type mismatch: {self.q_dtype} != {self.k_dtype}")
446 if const_expr(self.q_dtype != self.v_dtype):
447 raise TypeError(f"Type mismatch: {self.q_dtype} != {self.v_dtype}")
448 self._setup_attributes()
449 self.use_tma_O = (
450 self.arch >= Arch.sm_90 and mCuSeqlensQ is None and mSeqUsedQ is None
451 )
452 # This can be tuned
453 # This is currently very ad-hoc, we should tune it systematically
454 self.ex2_emu_freq = 0
455 # self.ex2_emu_start_frg = 1 if self.is_causal else 0
456 self.ex2_emu_start_frg = 1
457 if const_expr(self.enable_ex2_emu):
458 self.ex2_emu_freq = 16
459 if const_expr(self.head_dim_padded == 128 and self.use_2cta_instrs):
460 self.ex2_emu_freq = 12
461 if const_expr(
462 self.pack_gqa
463 and self.head_dim_padded > 64
464 and not self.is_causal
465 and not self.is_local
466 ):
467 self.ex2_emu_freq = (
468 32 if mCuSeqlensQ is not None or mSeqUsedQ is not None else 10
469 )
470 if const_expr(self.head_dim_padded > 64 and self.is_causal):
471 self.ex2_emu_freq = 10
472
473 cta_group = (
474 tcgen05.CtaGroup.TWO if self.use_2cta_instrs else tcgen05.CtaGroup.ONE
475 )
476 q_major_mode = tcgen05.OperandMajorMode.K
477 k_major_mode = tcgen05.OperandMajorMode.K
478 v_major_mode = tcgen05.OperandMajorMode.MN
479 self.o_layout = cutlass.utils.LayoutEnum.from_tensor(mO)
480 # the intermediate tensor p is from tmem & mK-major
481 p_source = tcgen05.OperandSource.TMEM
482 p_major_mode = tcgen05.OperandMajorMode.K
483 tiled_mma_qk = sm100_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
484 self.q_dtype,
485 q_major_mode,
486 k_major_mode,
487 self.qk_acc_dtype,
488 cta_group,
489 self.mma_tiler_qk[:2],
490 )
491 tiled_mma_pv = sm100_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
492 self.v_dtype,
493 p_major_mode,
494 v_major_mode,
495 self.pv_acc_dtype,
496 cta_group,
497 self.mma_tiler_pv[:2],
498 p_source,
499 )
500
501 self.cluster_shape_mnk = (*self.cluster_shape_mn, 1)
502 cta_layout_vmnk = cute.tiled_divide(
503 cute.make_layout(self.cluster_shape_mnk), (tiled_mma_qk.thr_id.shape,)
504 )
505
506 # epi_tile is per-CTA (not full 2CTA) since each CTA writes its own O portion
507 self.epi_tile = (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded)
508
509 sQ_layout = sm100_utils_basic.make_smem_layout_a(
510 tiled_mma_qk, self.mma_tiler_qk, self.q_dtype, self.q_stage
511 )
512 sK_layout = sm100_utils_basic.make_smem_layout_b(
513 tiled_mma_qk, self.mma_tiler_qk, self.k_dtype, self.kv_stage
514 )
515 tP_layout = sm100_utils_basic.make_smem_layout_a(
516 tiled_mma_pv, self.mma_tiler_pv, self.q_dtype, self.s_stage
517 )
518 sV_layout = sm100_utils_basic.make_smem_layout_b(
519 tiled_mma_pv, self.mma_tiler_pv, self.v_dtype, self.kv_stage
520 )
521 sO_layout = sm100_utils_basic.make_smem_layout_epi(
522 self.o_dtype, self.o_layout, self.epi_tile, self.q_stage
523 )
524 if const_expr(not self.same_hdim_kv_padded):
525 # sK and sV are using the same physical smem so we need to adjust the stride so that they line up
526 stride_sK = const_expr(
527 max(sK_layout.outer.stride[-1], 0)
528 ) # take max to turn tuple to Int32
529 stride_sV = const_expr(max(sV_layout.outer.stride[-1], 0))
530 stage_stride = const_expr(
531 max(stride_sK, stride_sV)
532 if not self.uneven_kv_smem
533 else (stride_sK + stride_sV) // 2
534 )
535 sK_layout = cute.make_composed_layout(
536 sK_layout.inner,
537 0,
538 cute.make_layout(
539 (*sK_layout.outer.shape[:-1], self.kv_stage),
540 stride=(*sK_layout.outer.stride[:-1], stage_stride),
541 ),
542 )
543 sV_layout = cute.make_composed_layout(
544 sV_layout.inner,
545 0,
546 cute.make_layout(
547 (*sV_layout.outer.shape[:-1], self.kv_stage),
548 stride=(*sV_layout.outer.stride[:-1], stage_stride),
549 ),
550 )
551
552 if const_expr(self.pack_gqa):
553 shape_Q_packed = (
554 (self.qhead_per_kvhead, mQ.shape[0]),
555 mQ.shape[1],
556 mK.shape[2],
557 *mQ.shape[3:],
558 )
559 stride_Q_packed = (
560 (mQ.stride[2], mQ.stride[0]),
561 mQ.stride[1],
562 mQ.stride[2] * self.qhead_per_kvhead,
563 *mQ.stride[3:],
564 )
565 mQ = cute.make_tensor(
566 mQ.iterator, cute.make_layout(shape_Q_packed, stride=stride_Q_packed)
567 )
568 shape_O_packed = (
569 (self.qhead_per_kvhead, mO.shape[0]),
570 mO.shape[1],
571 mK.shape[2],
572 *mO.shape[3:],
573 )
574 stride_O_packed = (
575 (mO.stride[2], mO.stride[0]),
576 mO.stride[1],
577 mO.stride[2] * self.qhead_per_kvhead,
578 *mO.stride[3:],
579 )
580 mO = cute.make_tensor(
581 mO.iterator, cute.make_layout(shape_O_packed, stride=stride_O_packed)
582 )
583 if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
584 shape_LSE_packed = (
585 (self.qhead_per_kvhead, mLSE.shape[0]),
586 mK.shape[2],
587 *mLSE.shape[2:],
588 )
589 stride_LSE_packed = (
590 (mLSE.stride[1], mLSE.stride[0]),
591 mLSE.stride[1] * self.qhead_per_kvhead,
592 *mLSE.stride[2:],
593 )
594 mLSE = cute.make_tensor(
595 mLSE.iterator,
596 cute.make_layout(shape_LSE_packed, stride=stride_LSE_packed),
597 )
598
599 self.tma_copy_bytes = {
600 name: cute.size_in_bytes(
601 mX.element_type, cute.select(layout, mode=[0, 1, 2])
602 )
603 for name, mX, layout in [
604 ("Q", mQ, sQ_layout),
605 ("K", mK, sK_layout),
606 ("V", mV, sV_layout),
607 ]
608 }
609 for name in ("Q", "K", "V"):
610 self.tma_copy_bytes[name] *= self.cta_group_size
611
612 # TMA load for Q
613 tma_load_op = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp(cta_group)
614 tma_store_op = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileS2GOp()
615
616 tma_atom_Q, mQ = cute.nvgpu.make_tiled_tma_atom_A(
617 tma_load_op,
618 mQ,
619 cute.select(sQ_layout, mode=[0, 1, 2]),
620 self.mma_tiler_qk,
621 tiled_mma_qk,
622 cta_layout_vmnk.shape,
623 )
624
625 tma_atom_K = None
626 tma_atom_V = None
627 if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV):
628 # TMA load for K
629 tma_atom_K, mK = cute.nvgpu.make_tiled_tma_atom_B(
630 tma_load_op,
631 mK,
632 cute.select(sK_layout, mode=[0, 1, 2]),
633 self.mma_tiler_qk,
634 tiled_mma_qk,
635 cta_layout_vmnk.shape,
636 )
637 # TMA load for V
638 tma_atom_V, mV = cute.nvgpu.make_tiled_tma_atom_B(
639 tma_load_op,
640 mV,
641 cute.select(sV_layout, mode=[0, 1, 2]),
642 self.mma_tiler_pv,
643 tiled_mma_pv,
644 cta_layout_vmnk.shape,
645 )
646
647 self.num_epilogue_threads = cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.epilogue_warp_ids)
648 if const_expr(self.use_tma_O):
649 tma_atom_O, mO = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
650 tma_store_op, mO, cute.select(sO_layout, mode=[0, 1]), self.epi_tile
651 )
652 gmem_tiled_copy_O = None
653 else:
654 tma_atom_O = None
655 universal_copy_bits = 128
656 async_copy_elems = universal_copy_bits // self.o_dtype.width
657 atom_universal_copy = cute.make_copy_atom(
658 cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(),
659 self.o_dtype,
660 num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
661 )
662 tO_shape_dim_1 = sO_layout.outer.shape[1][0] // async_copy_elems
663 tO_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
664 (self.num_epilogue_threads // tO_shape_dim_1, tO_shape_dim_1),
665 order=(1, 0),
666 )
667 # So that we don't have to check if we overshoot kBlockM when we store O
668 assert self.m_block_size % tO_layout.shape[0] == 0
669 vO_layout = cute.make_layout((1, async_copy_elems))
670 gmem_tiled_copy_O = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(
671 atom_universal_copy, tO_layout, vO_layout
672 )
673
674 if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None or mSeqUsedQ is not None):
675 TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
676 else:
677 if const_expr(self.is_causal or self.is_local):
678 TileScheduler = SingleTileLPTScheduler
679 else:
680 TileScheduler = (
681 SingleTileScheduler
682 if const_expr(not self.is_persistent)
683 else StaticPersistentTileScheduler
684 )
685 tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
686 cute.ceil_div(cute.size(mQ.shape[0]), self.cta_tiler[0]),
687 cute.size(mQ.shape[2]),
688 cute.size(mQ.shape[3])
689 if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None)
690 else cute.size(mCuSeqlensQ.shape[0] - 1),
691 num_splits,
692 cute.size(mK.shape[0])
693 if const_expr(mPageTable is None)
694 else mK.shape[0] * mPageTable.shape[1],
695 mQ.shape[1],
696 mV.shape[
697 0
698 ], # Note that this is different from Sm90 since we transpose mV in Sm100
699 total_q=cute.size(mQ.shape[0])
700 if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
701 else cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) * cute.size(mQ.shape[3]),
702 tile_shape_mn=self.cta_tiler[:2],
703 mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
704 mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
705 qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
706 if const_expr(self.pack_gqa)
707 else 1,
708 element_size=self.k_dtype.width // 8,
709 is_persistent=self.is_persistent,
710 lpt=self.is_causal or self.is_local,
711 is_split_kv=self.is_split_kv,
712 cluster_shape_mn=self.cluster_shape_mn,
713 )
714 tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
715 self.tile_scheduler_cls = TileScheduler
716 grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
717
718 sO_size = cute.cosize(sO_layout) if const_expr(not self.overlap_sO_sQ) else 0
719 sQ_size = (
720 cute.cosize(sQ_layout)
721 if const_expr(not self.overlap_sO_sQ)
722 else cutlass.max(
723 cute.cosize(sQ_layout),
724 cute.cosize(sO_layout) * self.o_dtype.width // self.q_dtype.width,
725 )
726 )
727
728 @cute.struct
729 class SharedStorage:
730 # m_barriers for pipelines
731 mbar_load_Q: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
732 mbar_load_KV: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.kv_stage * 2]
733 mbar_S_full_P_full_O_rescaled: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
734 mbar_P_full_lastsplit: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
735 mbar_O_full: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
736 mbar_softmax_stats: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
737 # mbar_softmax_stats: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 4 * 2]
738 mbar_O_epi: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, self.q_stage * 2]
739 mbar_s0_s1_sequence: cute.struct.MemRange[Int64, 2 * 2]
740 # Tmem dealloc cluster barrier
741 tmem_dealloc_mbar_ptr: Int64
742 # Tmem holding buffer
743 tmem_holding_buf: Int32
744 # Smem tensors
745 # store row max and row sum
746 sScale: cute.struct.MemRange[Float32, self.q_stage * self.m_block_size * 2]
747 sO: cute.struct.Align[
748 cute.struct.MemRange[self.o_dtype, sO_size], self.buffer_align_bytes
749 ]
750 sQ: cute.struct.Align[
751 cute.struct.MemRange[self.q_dtype, sQ_size], self.buffer_align_bytes
752 ]
753 sK: cute.struct.Align[
754 # cute.cosize(sK_layout) is correct even in the case of self.uneven_kv_smem
755 cute.struct.MemRange[self.k_dtype, cute.cosize(sK_layout)],
756 self.buffer_align_bytes,
757 ]
758
759 self.shared_storage = SharedStorage
760
761 LOG2_E = math.log2(math.e)
762 if const_expr(self.score_mod is None):
763 softmax_scale_log2 = softmax_scale * LOG2_E
764 softmax_scale = None
765 else:
766 # NB: If a users passes in a score mod, we want to apply the score-mod in the sm_scaled qk
767 # But in the original base 10. We hijack softmax_scale_log2 to just be the change of base
768 # and correctly apply the softmax_scale prior to score_mod in the softmax step
769 softmax_scale_log2 = LOG2_E
770 softmax_scale = softmax_scale
771
772 if const_expr(window_size_left is not None):
773 window_size_left = Int32(window_size_left)
774 if const_expr(window_size_right is not None):
775 window_size_right = Int32(window_size_right)
776
777 fastdiv_mods = None
778 if cutlass.const_expr(aux_tensors is not None):
779 seqlen_q = cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) // (
780 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1
781 )
782 seqlen_k = (
783 cute.size(mK.shape[0])
784 if const_expr(mPageTable is None)
785 else mK.shape[0] * mPageTable.shape[1]
786 )
787 seqlen_q_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen_q)
788 seqlen_k_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen_k)
789 fastdiv_mods = (seqlen_q_divmod, seqlen_k_divmod)
790
791 head_divmod = None
792 if cutlass.const_expr(self.pack_gqa):
793 head_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(self.qhead_per_kvhead)
794
795 self.use_block_sparsity = cutlass.const_expr(blocksparse_tensors is not None)
796 if cutlass.const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity and mPageTable is not None):
797 raise NotImplementedError(
798 "Block sparsity + paged KV not supported on SM100"
799 )
800
801 # Launch the kernel synchronously
802 self.kernel(
803 mQ,
804 mK,
805 mV,
806 mO,
807 mLSE,
808 mCuSeqlensQ,
809 mCuSeqlensK,
810 mSeqUsedQ,
811 mSeqUsedK,
812 mPageTable,
813 tma_atom_Q,
814 tma_atom_K,
815 tma_atom_V,
816 tma_atom_O,
817 softmax_scale_log2,
818 softmax_scale,
819 window_size_left,
820 window_size_right,
821 learnable_sink,
822 blocksparse_tensors,
823 sQ_layout,
824 sK_layout,
825 tP_layout,
826 sV_layout,
827 sO_layout,
828 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
829 tiled_mma_qk,
830 tiled_mma_pv,
831 tile_sched_params,
832 num_splits,
833 aux_tensors,
834 fastdiv_mods,
835 head_divmod,
836 ).launch(
837 grid=grid_dim,
838 block=[self.threads_per_cta, 1, 1],
839 cluster=self.cluster_shape_mnk
840 if cute.size(self.cluster_shape_mnk) > 1
841 else None,
842 stream=stream,
843 min_blocks_per_mp=1,
844 )
845
846 # GPU device kernel
847 @cute.kernel
848 def kernel(
849 self,
850 mQ: cute.Tensor, # (s_q, d, h, b) or (total_q, d, h) if there is cu_seqlens_q
851 mK: cute.Tensor, # (s_k, d, h_k, b_k) or (total_k, d, h_k) if there is cu_seqlens_k or (page_size, d, h_k, num_pages) if there is page_table
852 mV: cute.Tensor, # (d, s_k, h_k, b_k) or (d, total_k, h_k) if there is cu_seqlens_k or (d, page_size, h_k, num_pages) if there is page_table
853 mO: cute.Tensor,
854 mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
855 mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
856 mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
857 mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
858 mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
859 mPageTable: Optional[cute.Tensor],
860 tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
861 tma_atom_K: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
862 tma_atom_V: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
863 tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
864 softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
865 softmax_scale: Float32 | None,
866 window_size_left: Optional[Int32],
867 window_size_right: Optional[Int32],
868 learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor],
869 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors],
870 sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
871 sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
872 tP_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
873 sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
874 sO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
875 gmem_tiled_copy_O: Optional[cute.TiledCopy],
876 tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
877 tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
878 tile_sched_params: ParamsBase,
879 num_splits: Int32,
880 aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
881 fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
882 head_divmod=None,
883 ):
884 """The device kernel implementation of the Fused Multi-Head Attention.
885
886 This kernel coordinates multiple specialized warps to perform different phases of the FMHA computation:
887 1. Load warp: Loads Q, K, V data from global memory to shared memory using TMA
888 2. MMA warp: Performs matrix multiplications (Q*K^T and P*V)
889 3. Softmax warps: Compute softmax normalization on attention scores
890 4. Correction warps: Apply adjustments to intermediate results
891 5. Epilogue warp: Handles final output transformation and storage
892
893 The kernel implements a complex pipeline with overlapping computation and memory operations,
894 using tensor memory access (TMA) for efficient data loading, warp specialization for different
895 computation phases, and optional attention masking.
896 """
897
898 warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
899
900 # Prefetch tma descriptor
901 if warp_idx == 0:
902 for tma_atom in (tma_atom_Q, tma_atom_K, tma_atom_V, tma_atom_O):
903 if const_expr(tma_atom is not None):
904 cpasync.prefetch_descriptor(tma_atom)
905
906 cta_layout_vmnk = cute.tiled_divide(
907 cute.make_layout(self.cluster_shape_mnk), (tiled_mma_qk.thr_id.shape,)
908 )
909 # Setup cta/thread coordinates
910 bidx, _, _ = cute.arch.block_idx()
911 if const_expr(cute.size(tiled_mma_qk.thr_id.shape) == 1):
912 mma_tile_coord_v = 0
913 else:
914 mma_tile_coord_v = bidx % cute.size(tiled_mma_qk.thr_id.shape)
915 is_leader_cta = mma_tile_coord_v == 0
916
917 # Alloc
918 smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
919 storage = smem.allocate(self.shared_storage)
920
921 tmem_alloc_barrier = pipeline.NamedBarrier(
922 barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.TmemPtr),
923 num_threads=cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
924 * len(
925 (
926 self.mma_warp_id,
927 *self.softmax0_warp_ids,
928 *self.softmax1_warp_ids,
929 *self.correction_warp_ids,
930 )
931 ),
932 )
933 # Tensor memory dealloc barrier init
934 tmem = cutlass.utils.TmemAllocator(
935 storage.tmem_holding_buf,
936 barrier_for_retrieve=tmem_alloc_barrier,
937 allocator_warp_id=self.mma_warp_id,
938 is_two_cta=self.use_2cta_instrs,
939 two_cta_tmem_dealloc_mbar_ptr=storage.tmem_dealloc_mbar_ptr,
940 )
941
942 ThreadCooperativeGroup = partial(
943 pipeline.CooperativeGroup, pipeline.Agent.Thread
944 )
945 mma_warp = ThreadCooperativeGroup(len([self.mma_warp_id]))
946 load_warps = ThreadCooperativeGroup(len(self.load_warp_ids))
947 tma_warp = ThreadCooperativeGroup(1)
948 softmax_warps = ThreadCooperativeGroup(len(self.softmax0_warp_ids))
949 softmax_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
950 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.softmax0_warp_ids)
951 )
952 # softmax_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(cute.arch.WARP_SIZE)
953 correction_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
954 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.correction_warp_ids)
955 )
956 # correction_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(cute.arch.WARP_SIZE)
957 softmax_correction_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
958 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.softmax0_warp_ids + self.correction_warp_ids)
959 )
960 epilogue_threads = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
961 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.epilogue_warp_ids)
962 )
963 # For UMMA-bridging pipelines: the non-MMA side spans both CTAs in the cluster,
964 # so the thread count must include warps from both CTAs.
965 softmax_warps_cluster = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
966 len(self.softmax0_warp_ids) * self.cta_group_size
967 )
968 correction_threads_cluster = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
969 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.correction_warp_ids) * self.cta_group_size
970 )
971 softmax_correction_threads_cluster = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
972 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
973 * len(self.softmax0_warp_ids + self.correction_warp_ids)
974 * self.cta_group_size
975 )
976 pipeline_q = pipeline_custom.PipelineTmaUmma.create(
977 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_load_Q.data_ptr(),
978 num_stages=self.q_stage,
979 producer_group=tma_warp,
980 consumer_group=mma_warp,
981 tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["Q"],
982 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
983 defer_sync=True,
984 )
985 if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV):
986 pipeline_kv = pipeline_custom.PipelineTmaUmma.create(
987 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_load_KV.data_ptr(),
988 num_stages=self.kv_stage,
989 producer_group=tma_warp,
990 consumer_group=mma_warp,
991 tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["K"],
992 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
993 defer_sync=True,
994 )
995 else:
996 cpasync_producer_group = pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
997 pipeline.Agent.Thread, len(self.load_warp_ids) * cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
998 )
999 pipeline_kv = pipeline.PipelineAsyncUmma.create(
1000 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_load_KV.data_ptr(),
1001 num_stages=self.kv_stage,
1002 producer_group=cpasync_producer_group,
1003 consumer_group=mma_warp,
1004 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
1005 defer_sync=True,
1006 )
1007 # This pipeline is not the typical producer-consumer pipeline. The "producer" mma warp
1008 # uses it to signal that S is ready, and the softmax threads wait for S to be ready.
1009 # When softmax threads write P to tmem and the correction threads have rescaled O, they
1010 # signal as "consumer". The mma warp then waits for that signal to do the P @ V gemm.
1011 pipeline_s_p_o = pipeline_custom.PipelineUmmaAsync.create(
1012 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_S_full_P_full_O_rescaled.data_ptr(),
1013 num_stages=self.q_stage,
1014 producer_group=mma_warp,
1015 consumer_group=softmax_correction_threads_cluster,
1016 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
1017 defer_sync=True,
1018 )
1019 pipeline_p_lastsplit = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsyncUmma.create(
1020 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_P_full_lastsplit.data_ptr(),
1021 num_stages=self.q_stage,
1022 producer_group=softmax_warps_cluster,
1023 consumer_group=mma_warp,
1024 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
1025 defer_sync=True,
1026 )
1027 # MMA warp uses this to signal to the correction warps that O is ready.
1028 pipeline_o_acc = pipeline_custom.PipelineUmmaAsync.create(
1029 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_O_full.data_ptr(),
1030 num_stages=self.q_stage,
1031 producer_group=mma_warp,
1032 consumer_group=correction_threads_cluster,
1033 cta_layout_vmnk=cta_layout_vmnk,
1034 defer_sync=True,
1035 )
1036 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence = None
1037 if const_expr(self.s0_s1_barrier and self.q_stage > 1):
1038 # This is not a typical producer-consumer pipeline. We will directly use
1039 # pipeline_s0_s1_sequence.sync_object_full and will not use
1040 # pipeline_s0_s1_sequence.sync_object_empty.
1041 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsync.create(
1042 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_s0_s1_sequence.data_ptr(),
1043 num_stages=2,
1044 producer_group=softmax_threads,
1045 consumer_group=softmax_threads,
1046 defer_sync=True,
1047 )
1048 pipeline_sm_stats = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsync.create(
1049 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_softmax_stats.data_ptr(),
1050 num_stages=self.q_stage,
1051 producer_group=softmax_threads,
1052 consumer_group=correction_threads,
1053 defer_sync=True,
1054 )
1055 # Should put the NamedBarrier inside the pipeline class so we'll just have pipeline_sm_stats
1056 sm_stats_barrier = pipeline_custom.NamedBarrier(
1057 barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.SoftmaxStatsW0),
1058 num_threads=cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * 2,
1059 )
1060 pipeline_o_epi = None
1061 if const_expr(not self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
1062 pipeline_o_epi = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsync.create(
1063 barrier_storage=storage.mbar_O_epi.data_ptr(),
1064 num_stages=self.q_stage,
1065 producer_group=correction_threads,
1066 consumer_group=epilogue_threads,
1067 defer_sync=True,
1068 )
1069
1070 # Cluster arrive after barrier init
1071 pipeline_init_arrive(cluster_shape_mn=cta_layout_vmnk, is_relaxed=True)
1072
1073 # Generate smem tensor Q/K/V/O
1074 # (MMA, MMA_Q, MMA_D, PIPE)
1075 sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout.outer, swizzle=sQ_layout.inner)
1076 # (MMA, MMA_K, MMA_D, PIPE)
1077 sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout.outer, swizzle=sK_layout.inner)
1078 # (MMA, MMA_K, MMA_D, PIPE)
1079 # Strip swizzle info to reuse smem
1080 sV = cute.make_tensor(
1081 cute.recast_ptr(sK.iterator, sV_layout.inner), sV_layout.outer
1082 )
1083 if const_expr(not self.overlap_sO_sQ):
1084 sO = storage.sO.get_tensor(sO_layout.outer, swizzle=sO_layout.inner)
1085 else:
1086 sO = cute.make_tensor(
1087 cute.recast_ptr(sQ.iterator, sO_layout.inner, self.o_dtype),
1088 sO_layout.outer,
1089 )
1090
1091 sScale = storage.sScale.get_tensor(
1092 cute.make_layout(self.q_stage * self.m_block_size * 2)
1093 )
1094
1095 thr_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(mma_tile_coord_v)
1096 thr_mma_pv = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(mma_tile_coord_v)
1097
1098 qk_acc_shape = thr_mma_qk.partition_shape_C(self.mma_tiler_qk[:2])
1099 # This is a fake tensor, by right we need to retrieve tmem_ptr. But we know that we always
1100 # request 512 columns of tmem, so we know that it starts at 0.
1101 tStS = thr_mma_qk.make_fragment_C(cute.append(qk_acc_shape, self.s_stage))
1102 pv_acc_shape = thr_mma_pv.partition_shape_C(self.mma_tiler_pv[:2])
1103 tOtO = thr_mma_pv.make_fragment_C(cute.append(pv_acc_shape, self.q_stage))
1104 tOtO = cute.make_tensor(tOtO.iterator + self.tmem_o_offset[0], tOtO.layout)
1105 tP = cute.make_tensor(tStS.iterator, tP_layout.outer)
1106 tOrP = thr_mma_pv.make_fragment_A(tP)[None, None, None, 0]
1107 # Need to multiply by width ratio bc tP is in v_dtype but tmem offsets are in FP32
1108 tP_width_ratio = Float32.width // self.v_dtype.width
1109 # Need to adjust the stage stride manually since the two stages aren't contiguous in tmem
1110 tP_stage_stride = (
1111 self.tmem_p_offset[1] - self.tmem_p_offset[0]
1112 ) * tP_width_ratio
1113 tOrP = cute.make_tensor(
1114 tOrP.iterator + self.tmem_p_offset[0] * tP_width_ratio,
1115 cute.append(
1116 tOrP.layout,
1117 cute.make_layout((self.s_stage,), stride=(tP_stage_stride,)),
1118 ),
1119 )
1120
1121 block_info = BlockInfo(
1122 # This is cta_tiler, not mma_tiler_qk, since we move by block by (2 * mma_tiler[0], mma_tiler[1])
1123 self.cta_tiler[0],
1124 self.cta_tiler[1],
1125 self.is_causal,
1126 self.is_local,
1127 self.is_split_kv,
1128 window_size_left,
1129 window_size_right,
1130 qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
1131 if const_expr(self.pack_gqa)
1132 else 1,
1133 )
1134 SeqlenInfoCls = partial(
1135 SeqlenInfoQK.create,
1136 seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0]
1137 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa)
1138 else mQ.shape[0][1],
1139 seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0]
1140 if const_expr(mPageTable is None)
1141 else mK.shape[0] * mPageTable.shape[1],
1142 mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
1143 mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
1144 mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
1145 mSeqUsedK=mSeqUsedK,
1146 )
1147 AttentionMaskCls = partial(
1148 AttentionMask,
1149 self.m_block_size,
1150 self.n_block_size,
1151 window_size_left=window_size_left,
1152 window_size_right=window_size_right,
1153 qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
1154 if const_expr(self.pack_gqa)
1155 else 1,
1156 )
1157 TileSchedulerCls = partial(self.tile_scheduler_cls.create, tile_sched_params)
1158
1159 # Cluster wait before tensor memory alloc
1160 pipeline_init_wait(cluster_shape_mn=cta_layout_vmnk)
1161
1162 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1163 # EMPTY
1164 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1165 for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(len(self.empty_warp_ids)):
1166 if warp_idx == self.empty_warp_ids[i]:
1167 cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_regs_other)
1168
1169 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1170 # LOAD
1171 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1172 if warp_idx >= self.load_warp_ids[0] and warp_idx <= self.load_warp_ids[-1]:
1173 cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_regs_other)
1174 self.load(
1175 thr_mma_qk,
1176 thr_mma_pv,
1177 mQ,
1178 mK,
1179 mV,
1180 sQ,
1181 sK,
1182 sV,
1183 mPageTable,
1184 tma_atom_Q,
1185 tma_atom_K,
1186 tma_atom_V,
1187 pipeline_q,
1188 pipeline_kv,
1189 block_info,
1190 num_splits,
1191 SeqlenInfoCls,
1192 TileSchedulerCls,
1193 blocksparse_tensors,
1194 )
1195
1196 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1197 # MMA
1198 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1199 if warp_idx == self.mma_warp_id:
1200 cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_regs_other)
1201 # Alloc tensor memory buffer
1202 tmem.allocate(cute.arch.get_max_tmem_alloc_cols("sm_100"))
1203 tmem.wait_for_alloc()
1204 tmem_ptr = tmem.retrieve_ptr(self.qk_acc_dtype)
1205 self.mma(
1206 tiled_mma_qk,
1207 tiled_mma_pv,
1208 sQ,
1209 sK,
1210 sV,
1211 tStS,
1212 tOtO,
1213 tOrP,
1214 pipeline_q,
1215 pipeline_kv,
1216 pipeline_s_p_o,
1217 pipeline_p_lastsplit,
1218 pipeline_o_acc,
1219 is_leader_cta,
1220 block_info,
1221 num_splits,
1222 SeqlenInfoCls,
1223 TileSchedulerCls,
1224 blocksparse_tensors,
1225 )
1226 # Dealloc the tensor memory buffer
1227 tmem.relinquish_alloc_permit()
1228 tmem.free(tmem_ptr)
1229
1230 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1231 # Epilogue
1232 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1233 if const_expr(not self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
1234 if (
1235 warp_idx >= self.epilogue_warp_ids[0]
1236 and warp_idx <= self.epilogue_warp_ids[-1]
1237 ):
1238 cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_regs_other)
1239 self.epilogue_s2g(
1240 mO,
1241 sO,
1242 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
1243 tma_atom_O,
1244 pipeline_o_epi,
1245 block_info,
1246 num_splits,
1247 SeqlenInfoCls,
1248 TileSchedulerCls,
1249 mma_tile_coord_v,
1250 )
1251
1252 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1253 # Softmax
1254 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1255 if (
1256 const_expr(self.q_stage == 2) and warp_idx <= self.softmax1_warp_ids[-1]
1257 ) or (const_expr(self.q_stage == 1) and warp_idx <= self.softmax0_warp_ids[-1]):
1258 # increase register after decreasing
1259 cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_regs_softmax)
1260 # sync with mma warp before retrieving tmem ptr
1261 tmem.wait_for_alloc()
1262 tmem_ptr = tmem.retrieve_ptr(self.qk_acc_dtype)
1263 softmax_loop = partial(
1264 self.softmax_loop,
1265 softmax_scale_log2=softmax_scale_log2,
1266 softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
1267 thr_mma_qk=thr_mma_qk,
1268 sScale=sScale,
1269 mLSE=mLSE,
1270 pipeline_s_p_o=pipeline_s_p_o,
1271 pipeline_p_lastsplit=pipeline_p_lastsplit,
1272 pipeline_sm_stats=pipeline_sm_stats,
1273 sm_stats_barrier=sm_stats_barrier,
1274 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence=pipeline_s0_s1_sequence,
1275 learnable_sink=learnable_sink,
1276 block_info=block_info,
1277 num_splits=num_splits,
1278 SeqlenInfoCls=SeqlenInfoCls,
1279 AttentionMaskCls=AttentionMaskCls,
1280 TileSchedulerCls=TileSchedulerCls,
1281 aux_tensors=aux_tensors,
1282 fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
1283 head_divmod=head_divmod,
1284 blocksparse_tensors=blocksparse_tensors,
1285 )
1286
1287 if const_expr(not self.s0_s1_barrier):
1288 stage = Int32(
1289 0
1290 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 1)
1291 or warp_idx < self.softmax1_warp_ids[0]
1292 else 1
1293 )
1294 softmax_loop(stage=stage, tStS=tStS)
1295 else:
1296 # If there's s0_s1_barrier, it's faster to have 2 WGs having different code
1297 if warp_idx < self.softmax1_warp_ids[0]:
1298 softmax_loop(stage=0, tStS=tStS)
1299 if (
1300 warp_idx < self.correction_warp_ids[0]
1301 and warp_idx >= self.softmax1_warp_ids[0]
1302 ):
1303 softmax_loop(stage=1, tStS=tStS)
1304
1305 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1306 # Correction
1307 # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1308 if warp_idx >= self.correction_warp_ids[0] and warp_idx < self.mma_warp_id:
1309 cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_regs_correction)
1310 # sync with mma warp before retrieving tmem ptr
1311 tmem.wait_for_alloc()
1312 tmem_ptr = tmem.retrieve_ptr(self.qk_acc_dtype)
1313 self.correction_loop(
1314 thr_mma_qk,
1315 thr_mma_pv,
1316 tStS,
1317 tOtO,
1318 sScale,
1319 mO,
1320 mLSE,
1321 sO,
1322 pipeline_s_p_o,
1323 pipeline_o_acc,
1324 pipeline_sm_stats,
1325 sm_stats_barrier,
1326 pipeline_o_epi,
1327 learnable_sink,
1328 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
1329 tma_atom_O,
1330 softmax_scale_log2,
1331 block_info,
1332 num_splits,
1333 SeqlenInfoCls,
1334 TileSchedulerCls,
1335 blocksparse_tensors,
1336 )
1337
1338 return
1339
1340 @cute.jit
1341 def load(
1342 self,
1343 thr_mma_qk: cute.core.ThrMma,
1344 thr_mma_pv: cute.core.ThrMma,
1345 mQ: cute.Tensor,
1346 mK: cute.Tensor,
1347 mV: cute.Tensor,
1348 sQ: cute.Tensor,
1349 sK: cute.Tensor,
1350 sV: cute.Tensor,
1351 mPageTable: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1352 tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
1353 tma_atom_K: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
1354 tma_atom_V: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
1355 pipeline_q: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1356 pipeline_kv: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1357 block_info: BlockInfo,
1358 num_splits: Int32,
1359 SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1360 TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1361 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors],
1362 ):
1363 num_load_threads = len(self.load_warp_ids) * cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
1364 tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % num_load_threads
1365 bidx, bidy, bidz = cute.arch.block_idx()
1366 warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1367 q_producer_phase = Int32(1)
1368 kv_producer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1369 pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.kv_stage
1370 )
1371 tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1372 work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1373 while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1374 m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx = work_tile.tile_idx
1375 seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1376 mQ_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mQ, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None, head_idx]
1377 tiler_gQ = ((self.mma_tiler_qk[0] * self.q_stage), self.head_dim_padded)
1378 gQ = cute.local_tile(mQ_cur, tiler_gQ, (m_block, 0)) # (128 * 2, 128)
1379 gQ = layout_utils.select(
1380 cute.flat_divide(gQ, (self.mma_tiler_qk[0],)), mode=[0, 2, 1]
1381 ) # (128, 128, 2)
1382
1383 head_idx_kv = (
1384 head_idx // self.qhead_per_kvhead
1385 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa)
1386 else head_idx
1387 )
1388 if const_expr(mPageTable is None):
1389 if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
1390 mK_cur, mV_cur = [
1391 t[None, None, head_idx_kv, batch_idx] for t in (mK, mV)
1392 ]
1393 else:
1394 mK_cur = cute.domain_offset(
1395 (seqlen.offset_k, 0), mK[None, None, head_idx_kv]
1396 )
1397 mV_cur = cute.domain_offset(
1398 (0, seqlen.offset_k), mV[None, None, head_idx_kv]
1399 )
1400 gK = cute.local_tile(
1401 mK_cur, cute.select(self.mma_tiler_qk, mode=[1, 2]), (None, 0)
1402 )
1403 gV = cute.local_tile(
1404 mV_cur, cute.select(self.mma_tiler_pv, mode=[1, 2]), (0, None)
1405 )
1406 else:
1407 # Need to keep batch coord None since we'll index into it with page idx
1408 mK_cur, mV_cur = [t[None, None, head_idx_kv, None] for t in (mK, mV)]
1409 gK = cute.local_tile(
1410 mK_cur, cute.select(self.mma_tiler_qk, mode=[1, 2]), (None, 0, None)
1411 )
1412 gV = cute.local_tile(
1413 mV_cur, cute.select(self.mma_tiler_pv, mode=[1, 2]), (0, None, None)
1414 )
1415 tSgQ = thr_mma_qk.partition_A(gQ)
1416 tSgK = thr_mma_qk.partition_B(gK)
1417 tOgV = thr_mma_pv.partition_B(gV)
1418 load_Q_fn, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1419 tma_atom_Q, 0, cute.make_layout(1), tSgQ, sQ
1420 )
1421
1422 if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV):
1423 tKsK, tKgK = cpasync.tma_partition(
1424 tma_atom_K,
1425 0, # no multicast
1426 cute.make_layout(1),
1427 cute.group_modes(sK, 0, 3),
1428 cute.group_modes(tSgK, 0, 3),
1429 )
1430 tVsV, tVgV = cpasync.tma_partition(
1431 tma_atom_V,
1432 0, # no multicast
1433 cute.make_layout(1),
1434 cute.group_modes(sV, 0, 3),
1435 cute.group_modes(tOgV, 0, 3),
1436 )
1437 paged_kv_manager = None
1438 else:
1439 page_size = mK.shape[0]
1440 paged_kv_manager = PagedKVManager.create(
1441 mPageTable,
1442 mK,
1443 mV,
1444 FastDivmodDivisor(page_size),
1445 batch_idx,
1446 head_idx_kv,
1447 tidx,
1448 seqlen.seqlen_k,
1449 0, # leftpad_k
1450 self.n_block_size,
1451 self.head_dim_padded,
1452 self.head_dim_v_padded,
1453 num_load_threads,
1454 mK.element_type,
1455 )
1456 tKsK, tKgK = None, None
1457 tVsV, tVgV = None, None
1458
1459 load_Q = partial(
1460 self.load_Q, load_Q_fn, pipeline_q=pipeline_q, phase=q_producer_phase
1461 )
1462 load_K = partial(
1463 self.load_KV,
1464 tma_atom_K,
1465 tKgK,
1466 tKsK,
1467 paged_kv_manager,
1468 sK,
1469 pipeline_kv=pipeline_kv,
1470 K_or_V="K",
1471 )
1472 load_V = partial(
1473 self.load_KV,
1474 tma_atom_V,
1475 tVgV,
1476 tVsV,
1477 paged_kv_manager,
1478 sV,
1479 pipeline_kv=pipeline_kv,
1480 K_or_V="V",
1481 )
1482
1483 if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
1484 n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
1485 seqlen, m_block, split_idx, num_splits
1486 )
1487
1488 if const_expr(not self.is_split_kv) or n_block_min < n_block_max:
1489 n_block_first = n_block_max - 1 if n_block_max > 0 else 0
1490 page_idx = (
1491 mPageTable[batch_idx, n_block_first]
1492 if const_expr(mPageTable is not None and self.use_tma_KV)
1493 else None
1494 )
1495 if const_expr(not self.use_tma_KV):
1496 paged_kv_manager.load_page_table(n_block_first)
1497 load_K(
1498 block=n_block_max - 1,
1499 producer_state=kv_producer_state,
1500 page_idx=page_idx,
1501 ) # K0
1502 # load_K(block=n_block_max - 1, producer_state=kv_producer_state, page_idx=page_idx, extra_tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["Q"]) # K0
1503 if (
1504 const_expr(len(self.load_warp_ids) == 1)
1505 or warp_idx == self.load_warp_ids[0]
1506 ):
1507 # load_Q(block=0, stage=0) # Q0
1508 pipeline_q.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(0, q_producer_phase)
1509 # pipeline_q.sync_object_empty.wait(0, q_producer_phase)
1510 tma_bar_ptr = pipeline_q.sync_object_full.get_barrier(0)
1511 # tma_bar_ptr = pipeline_kv.producer_get_barrier(kv_producer_state)
1512 load_Q_fn(src_idx=0, dst_idx=0, tma_bar_ptr=tma_bar_ptr)
1513 kv_producer_state.advance()
1514 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 2) and (
1515 const_expr(len(self.load_warp_ids) == 1)
1516 or warp_idx == self.load_warp_ids[0]
1517 ):
1518 # load_Q(block=1, stage=1) # Q1
1519 pipeline_q.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(1, q_producer_phase)
1520 tma_bar_ptr = pipeline_q.sync_object_full.get_barrier(1)
1521 load_Q_fn(src_idx=1, dst_idx=1, tma_bar_ptr=tma_bar_ptr)
1522 q_producer_phase ^= 1
1523 load_V(
1524 block=n_block_max - 1,
1525 producer_state=kv_producer_state,
1526 page_idx=page_idx,
1527 ) # V0
1528 kv_producer_state.advance()
1529 for i in cutlass.range(n_block_max - 1 - n_block_min, unroll=1):
1530 n_block = n_block_max - 2 - i
1531 page_idx = (
1532 mPageTable[batch_idx, n_block]
1533 if const_expr(mPageTable is not None and self.use_tma_KV)
1534 else None
1535 )
1536 if const_expr(not self.use_tma_KV):
1537 paged_kv_manager.load_page_table(n_block)
1538 # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % 32 == 0: cute.printf("n_block = {}, page_idx = {}", n_block, page_idx)
1539 load_K(
1540 block=n_block,
1541 producer_state=kv_producer_state,
1542 page_idx=page_idx,
1543 ) # Ki
1544 kv_producer_state.advance()
1545 load_V(
1546 block=n_block,
1547 producer_state=kv_producer_state,
1548 page_idx=page_idx,
1549 ) # Vi
1550 kv_producer_state.advance()
1551
1552 else:
1553 kv_producer_state, q_producer_phase = produce_block_sparse_loads_sm100(
1554 blocksparse_tensors,
1555 batch_idx,
1556 head_idx,
1557 m_block,
1558 kv_producer_state,
1559 load_Q,
1560 load_K,
1561 load_V,
1562 pipeline_kv,
1563 self.q_stage,
1564 q_producer_phase,
1565 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1566 self.q_subtile_factor if self.q_subtile_factor is not None else 1,
1567 )
1568
1569 tile_scheduler.prefetch_next_work()
1570 tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1571 work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1572 # End of persistent scheduler loop
1573
1574 pipeline_kv.producer_tail(kv_producer_state)
1575 # This is equivalent to pipeline_q.producer_tail
1576 if (
1577 const_expr(len(self.load_warp_ids) == 1)
1578 or warp_idx == self.load_warp_ids[0]
1579 ):
1580 pipeline_q.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
1581 self.q_stage - 1, q_producer_phase
1582 )
1583
1584 @cute.jit
1585 def mma(
1586 self,
1587 tiled_mma_qk: cute.core.ThrMma,
1588 tiled_mma_pv: cute.core.ThrMma,
1589 sQ: cute.Tensor,
1590 sK: cute.Tensor,
1591 sV: cute.Tensor,
1592 tStS: cute.Tensor,
1593 tOtO: cute.Tensor,
1594 tOrP: cute.Tensor,
1595 pipeline_q: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1596 pipeline_kv: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1597 pipeline_s_p_o: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1598 pipeline_p_lastsplit: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1599 pipeline_o_acc: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1600 is_leader_cta: Boolean,
1601 block_info: BlockInfo,
1602 num_splits: Int32,
1603 SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1604 TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1605 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors],
1606 ):
1607 tSrQ = tiled_mma_qk.make_fragment_A(sQ)
1608 tSrK = tiled_mma_qk.make_fragment_B(sK)
1609 tOrV = tiled_mma_pv.make_fragment_B(sV)
1610 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 2):
1611 tSrQs = (tSrQ[None, None, None, 0], tSrQ[None, None, None, 1])
1612 else:
1613 tSrQs = (tSrQ[None, None, None, 0],)
1614
1615 qk_mma_op, pv_mma_op = tiled_mma_qk.op, tiled_mma_pv.op
1616 qk_mma_idesc, pv_mma_idesc = (
1617 sm100_desc.mma_op_to_idesc(qk_mma_op),
1618 sm100_desc.mma_op_to_idesc(pv_mma_op),
1619 )
1620 q_smem_base = sm100_desc.smem_desc_base_from_tensor(sQ, sm100_desc.Major.K)
1621 k_smem_base = sm100_desc.smem_desc_base_from_tensor(sK, sm100_desc.Major.K)
1622 v_smem_base = sm100_desc.smem_desc_base_from_tensor(sV, sm100_desc.Major.MN)
1623 q_smem_start = [
1624 sm100_desc.make_smem_desc_start_addr(sQ[None, None, None, stage].iterator)
1625 for stage in range(self.q_stage)
1626 ]
1627
1628 sm100_utils.declare_ptx_smem_desc(
1629 q_smem_start[self.q_stage - 1],
1630 q_smem_base,
1631 tSrQ[None, None, None, 0].layout,
1632 var_name_prefix="fa_fwd_q_smem_desc",
1633 )
1634 sm100_utils.declare_ptx_idesc(qk_mma_op, var_name="fa_fwd_qk_mma_idesc")
1635 sm100_utils.declare_ptx_idesc(pv_mma_op, var_name="fa_fwd_pv_mma_idesc")
1636
1637 sQ_stage_stride = (sQ.layout.stride[-1] * sQ.element_type.width // 8) >> 4
1638 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 1):
1639 sQ_stage_stride = 0
1640 gemm_Si = [
1641 partial(
1642 # sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_precomputed,
1643 # self.tmem_s_offset[stage],
1644 # smem_desc_start_a=q_smem_start[stage],
1645 # idesc=qk_mma_idesc,
1646 # smem_desc_base_a=q_smem_base,
1647 # smem_desc_base_b=k_smem_base,
1648 # tCrA_layout=tSrQ[None, None, None, 0].layout,
1649 sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_precomputed_varname,
1650 self.tmem_s_offset[stage],
1651 # idesc=qk_mma_idesc,
1652 smem_desc_base_b=k_smem_base,
1653 tCrB_layout=tSrK[None, None, None, 0].layout,
1654 smem_var_name_prefix=f"fa_fwd_q_smem_desc",
1655 idesc_var_name=f"fa_fwd_qk_mma_idesc",
1656 smem_offset=-sQ_stage_stride if stage == 0 else sQ_stage_stride,
1657 zero_init=True,
1658 cta_group=self.cta_group_size,
1659 )
1660 for stage in range(self.q_stage)
1661 ]
1662 # gemm_Si = [
1663 # partial(
1664 # sm100_utils.gemm,
1665 # tiled_mma_qk,
1666 # tStS[None, None, None, stage],
1667 # tCrA=tSrQ[None, None, None, stage],
1668 # zero_init=True,
1669 # )
1670 # for stage in range(self.q_stage)
1671 # ]
1672 gemm_Pi = [
1673 partial(
1674 # sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_precomputed,
1675 sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_partial,
1676 pv_mma_op,
1677 self.tmem_o_offset[stage],
1678 tOrP[None, None, None, stage],
1679 sA=None,
1680 split_arrive=self.split_P_arrive if self.split_P_arrive > 0 else None,
1681 # smem_desc_start_a=tOrP[None, None, None, stage].iterator.toint(),
1682 # smem_desc_start_a=self.tmem_p_offset[stage],
1683 # idesc=pv_mma_idesc,
1684 # smem_desc_base_a=None,
1685 # smem_desc_base_b=v_smem_base,
1686 # tCrA_layout=tOrP[None, None, None, 0].layout,
1687 # tCrB_layout=tOrV[None, None, None, 0].layout
1688 cta_group=self.cta_group_size,
1689 )
1690 for stage in range(self.q_stage)
1691 ]
1692 # gemm_Pi = [
1693 # partial(
1694 # sm100_utils.gemm, tOtO[None, None, None, stage], tCrA=tOrP[None, None, None, stage]
1695 # )
1696 # for stage in range(self.q_stage)
1697 # ]
1698
1699 mma_q_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
1700 mma_kv_consumer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1701 pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.kv_stage
1702 )
1703 P_full_O_rescaled_phase = Int32(0)
1704
1705 tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1706 work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1707 while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1708 m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx = work_tile.tile_idx
1709 seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1710
1711 block_iter_count = Int32(0)
1712 process_tile = False
1713
1714 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
1715 block_iter_count = get_total_block_count(
1716 blocksparse_tensors,
1717 batch_idx,
1718 head_idx,
1719 m_block,
1720 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1721 self.q_subtile_factor if self.q_subtile_factor is not None else 1,
1722 )
1723 process_tile = block_iter_count > Int32(0)
1724 else:
1725 n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
1726 seqlen, m_block, split_idx, num_splits
1727 )
1728 block_iter_count = n_block_max - n_block_min
1729 if const_expr(not self.is_split_kv):
1730 process_tile = True
1731 else:
1732 process_tile = n_block_min < n_block_max
1733
1734 if process_tile and is_leader_cta:
1735 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
1736 # GEMM_QK00 (Q0 * K0 -> S0) or GEMM_QK01 (Q1 * K0 -> S1)
1737 # 1. wait for Q0 / Q1
1738 pipeline_q.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, mma_q_consumer_phase)
1739 # 2. wait for K0
1740 if const_expr(stage == 0):
1741 pipeline_kv.consumer_wait(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1742 Ki_index, Ki_phase = (
1743 mma_kv_consumer_state.index,
1744 mma_kv_consumer_state.phase,
1745 )
1746 tSrKi = tSrK[None, None, None, Ki_index]
1747 # We don't need to acquire empty S0 / S1.
1748 # For the first iteration, we don't need to wait as we're guaranteed S0 / S1
1749 # are empty. For subsequent iterations, the wait happened at the end
1750 # of the while loop.
1751 # 3. gemm
1752 # sm100_utils.gemm(tiled_mma_qk, tStS[None, None, None, stage], tSrQ[None, None, None, stage], tSrKi, zero_init=True)
1753 sK_cur = sK[None, None, None, Ki_index]
1754 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
1755 sK_cur = self.offset_kv_smem(sK_cur, Ki_index, Ki_phase)
1756 # gemm_Si[stage](tCrB=tSrKi, sB=sK_cur)
1757 gemm_Si[stage](
1758 smem_desc_start_b=sm100_desc.make_smem_desc_start_addr(
1759 sK_cur.iterator
1760 )
1761 )
1762 # gemm_Si[stage](tCrB=tSrKi)
1763 # 4. release S0 / S1
1764 pipeline_s_p_o.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
1765 mma_q_consumer_phase ^= 1
1766 # 5. release K0
1767 pipeline_kv.consumer_release(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1768 mma_kv_consumer_state.advance()
1769 # End of GEMM (Q1 * K0 -> S1)
1770 # Note: Q0 & Q1 are still needed in the seqlen_kv loop
1771 # so we need to release them after the seqlen_kv loop
1772
1773 # O hasn't been accumulated yet, its first MMA calculation doesn't need to accumulate
1774 block_loop_count = block_iter_count - 1
1775 O_should_accumulate = False
1776 for i in cutlass.range(block_loop_count, unroll=1):
1777 # GEMM_PV00 (P0 * V0 -> O0_partial), O0 needs to be accumulated in the seqlen_kv loop
1778 # 1. wait for V0
1779 pipeline_kv.consumer_wait(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1780 mma_kv_release_state = mma_kv_consumer_state.clone()
1781 Vi_index, Vi_phase = (
1782 mma_kv_consumer_state.index,
1783 mma_kv_consumer_state.phase,
1784 )
1785 tOrVi = tOrV[None, None, None, Vi_index]
1786 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
1787 # 2. acquire corrected O0/O1_partial and P0 / P1
1788 # For the first iteration in this work tile, waiting for O0/O1_partial
1789 # means that the correction warps has finished reading tO during
1790 # the last iteration of the previous work tile.
1791 pipeline_s_p_o.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
1792 stage, P_full_O_rescaled_phase
1793 )
1794 # 3. gemm
1795 # sm100_utils.gemm(tiled_mma_pv, tOtO0, tOrP0, tOrVi, zero_init=True)
1796 # gemm_Pi[stage](tCrB=tOrVi, sB=sV[None, None, None, Vi_index], zero_init=not O_should_accumulate)
1797 sV_cur = sV[None, None, None, Vi_index]
1798 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
1799 sV_cur = self.offset_kv_smem(sV_cur, Vi_index, Vi_phase)
1800 gemm_Pi[stage](
1801 tCrB=tOrVi,
1802 sB=sV_cur,
1803 # smem_desc_start_b=sm100_desc.make_smem_desc_start_addr(sV_cur.iterator),
1804 zero_init=not O_should_accumulate,
1805 mbar_ptr=pipeline_p_lastsplit.sync_object_full.get_barrier(
1806 stage
1807 )
1808 if self.split_P_arrive > 0
1809 else None,
1810 mbar_phase=P_full_O_rescaled_phase,
1811 )
1812 # Don't need to signal O_full to the correction warps since the
1813 # correction warps wait for the softmax warps anyway. By the time the softmax
1814 # warps finished, S_i for the next iteration must have been done, so O_i-1
1815 # must have been done as well.
1816 # pipeline_o_acc.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
1817 # 4. release V(i-1)
1818 if const_expr(stage == self.q_stage - 1):
1819 pipeline_kv.consumer_release(mma_kv_release_state)
1820 mma_kv_release_state.advance()
1821 # End of GEMM_PV00 (P0 * V0 -> O0_partial)
1822
1823 # GEMM_QK0i (Q0 * Ki -> S0)
1824 # 1. wait for Ki
1825 if const_expr(stage == 0):
1826 mma_kv_consumer_state.advance()
1827 pipeline_kv.consumer_wait(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1828 Ki_index, Ki_phase = (
1829 mma_kv_consumer_state.index,
1830 mma_kv_consumer_state.phase,
1831 )
1832 # 2. gemm
1833 # Don't need to wait for the softmax warp to have finished reading the previous
1834 # Si, since this gemm is scheduled after the PV gemm, which guaranteed that Si
1835 # has been read and Pi has been written.
1836 # sm100_utils.gemm(tiled_mma_qk, tStS[None, None, None, stage], tSrQ[None, None, None, stage], tSrK[None, None, None, Ki_index], zero_init=True)
1837 sK_cur = sK[None, None, None, Ki_index]
1838 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
1839 sK_cur = self.offset_kv_smem(sK_cur, Ki_index, Ki_phase)
1840 # gemm_Si[stage](tCrB=tSrK[None, None, None, Ki_index], sB=sK_cur)
1841 gemm_Si[stage](
1842 smem_desc_start_b=sm100_desc.make_smem_desc_start_addr(
1843 sK_cur.iterator
1844 )
1845 )
1846 # gemm_Si[stage](tCrB=tSrK[None, None, None, Ki_index])
1847 # 3. release S0 / S1
1848 pipeline_s_p_o.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
1849 # End of GEMM_QK0i (Q0 * Ki -> S0)
1850 # 4. release Ki
1851 pipeline_kv.consumer_release(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1852 mma_kv_consumer_state.advance()
1853 P_full_O_rescaled_phase ^= 1
1854 O_should_accumulate = True
1855 # End of seqlen_kv loop
1856
1857 # release Q0 & Q1
1858 for stage in cutlass.range(self.q_stage):
1859 pipeline_q.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
1860
1861 # GEMM_PV00 (P0 * V0 -> O0_partial), O0 needs to be accumulated in the seqlen_kv loop
1862 # 1. wait for V0
1863 pipeline_kv.consumer_wait(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1864 Vi_index, Vi_phase = (
1865 mma_kv_consumer_state.index,
1866 mma_kv_consumer_state.phase,
1867 )
1868 tOrVi = tOrV[None, None, None, Vi_index]
1869 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
1870 # 2. acquire corrected Oi_partial and Pi
1871 pipeline_s_p_o.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
1872 stage, P_full_O_rescaled_phase
1873 )
1874 # 3. gemm
1875 # sm100_utils.gemm(tiled_mma_pv, tOtO0, tOrP0, tOrVi, zero_init=True)
1876 # gemm_Pi[stage](tCrB=tOrVi, sB=sV[None, None, None, Vi_index], zero_init=not O_should_accumulate)
1877 sV_cur = sV[None, None, None, Vi_index]
1878 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
1879 sV_cur = self.offset_kv_smem(sV_cur, Vi_index, Vi_phase)
1880 gemm_Pi[stage](
1881 tCrB=tOrVi,
1882 sB=sV_cur,
1883 # smem_desc_start_b=sm100_desc.make_smem_desc_start_addr(sV_cur.iterator),
1884 zero_init=not O_should_accumulate,
1885 mbar_ptr=pipeline_p_lastsplit.sync_object_full.get_barrier(
1886 stage
1887 )
1888 if self.split_P_arrive > 0
1889 else None,
1890 mbar_phase=P_full_O_rescaled_phase,
1891 )
1892 # 4. release accumulated O0_partial
1893 # We do need O_full here since for the last tile, by the time the softmax warp
1894 # has signaled to the correction warps, the softmax warp has just finished
1895 # computing the row sum of the current tile. It does not guarantee that the 1st
1896 # tile of the next work tile has been computed yet.
1897 pipeline_o_acc.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
1898 # End of GEMM_PV00 (P0 * V0 -> O0_partial)
1899 P_full_O_rescaled_phase ^= 1
1900 # 5. release Vi_end
1901 pipeline_kv.consumer_release(mma_kv_consumer_state)
1902 mma_kv_consumer_state.advance()
1903 # End of GEMM_PV1(i_end) (P1 * Vi_end -> O1)
1904
1905 # Advance to next tile
1906 tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1907 work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1908 # End of persistent scheduler loop
1909
1910 # We don't need pipeline_s_p_o.producer_tail() since there's no dangling mbarrier at the end
1911 # pipeline_s_p_o.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(self.q_stage - 1, P_full_O_rescaled_phase)
1912 # We don't need pipeline_o_acc.producer_tail() since we don't call
1913 # pipeline_o_acc.producer_acquire() inside the loop.
1914
1915 # for both softmax0 and softmax1 warp group
1916 @cute.jit
1917 def softmax_loop(
1918 self,
1919 stage: int | Int32,
1920 softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
1921 softmax_scale: Float32,
1922 thr_mma_qk: cute.core.ThrMma,
1923 tStS: cute.Tensor, # ((TILE_M, TILE_N), 1, 1, q_stage)
1924 sScale: cute.Tensor,
1925 mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1926 pipeline_s_p_o: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1927 pipeline_p_lastsplit: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1928 pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1929 sm_stats_barrier: pipeline.NamedBarrier,
1930 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
1931 learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1932 block_info: BlockInfo,
1933 num_splits: Int32,
1934 SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1935 AttentionMaskCls: Callable,
1936 TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1937 aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
1938 fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
1939 head_divmod=None,
1940 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
1941 ):
1942 """Compute softmax on attention scores from QK matrix multiplication.
1943
1944 This method handles the softmax computation for either the first or second half of the
1945 attention matrix, depending on the 'stage' parameter. It calculates row-wise maximum
1946 and sum values needed for stable softmax computation, applies optional masking, and
1947 transforms raw attention scores into probability distributions.
1948
1949 The implementation uses specialized memory access patterns and efficient math operations
1950 for computing exp(x) using exp2 functions. It also coordinates pipeline
1951 synchronization between MMA, correction, and sequence processing stages.
1952 """
1953 tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % (
1954 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
1955 # * (len(self.softmax0_warp_ids) if stage == 0 else len(self.softmax1_warp_ids)
1956 * (len(self.softmax0_warp_ids))
1957 )
1958 warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
1959 bidx, bidy, bidz = cute.arch.block_idx()
1960
1961 cta_qk_tiler = (
1962 self.mma_tiler_qk[0] // thr_mma_qk.thr_id.shape,
1963 self.mma_tiler_qk[1],
1964 )
1965 tSAcc = tStS[(None, None), 0, 0, stage] # (128, 128)
1966 tStScale = cute.composition(tSAcc, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, 1)))
1967 tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_qk[:2]))
1968 tScS = tScS[(None, None), 0, 0] # (128, 128)
1969 tScScale = cute.composition(tScS, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, 1)))
1970
1971 tilePlikeFP32 = self.mma_tiler_qk[1] // Float32.width * self.v_dtype.width
1972 tStP_layout = cute.composition(
1973 tSAcc.layout, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, tilePlikeFP32))
1974 )
1975 tStP = cute.make_tensor(tSAcc.iterator + self.tmem_s_to_p_offset, tStP_layout)
1976
1977 tmem_load_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
1978 tcgen05.copy.Ld32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(32)), self.qk_acc_dtype
1979 )
1980 thr_tmem_load = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_load_atom, tSAcc).get_slice(tidx)
1981 tStS_t2r = thr_tmem_load.partition_S(tSAcc) # (((32,32),1),1,4)
1982
1983 tmem_store_scale_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
1984 tcgen05.copy.St32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(1)), Float32
1985 )
1986 thr_tmem_store_scale = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(
1987 tmem_store_scale_atom, tStScale
1988 ).get_slice(tidx)
1989 tStScale_r2t = thr_tmem_store_scale.partition_D(tStScale)
1990 tmem_store_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
1991 tcgen05.copy.St32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(16)), Float32
1992 )
1993 thr_tmem_store = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_store_atom, tStP).get_slice(tidx)
1994 tStP_r2t = thr_tmem_store.partition_D(tStP) # (((16,32),1),1,4)
1995
1996 mma_si_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
1997 sm_stats_producer_phase = Int32(1)
1998 s0_s1_sequence_phase = Int32(1 if stage == 0 else 0)
1999
2000 # self.warp_scheduler_barrier_init()
2001
2002 warp_idx_in_wg = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
2003
2004 tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
2005 work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
2006 while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
2007 m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx = work_tile.tile_idx
2008 seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
2009 n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
2010 seqlen, m_block, split_idx, num_splits
2011 )
2012
2013 mask = AttentionMaskCls(seqlen)
2014 shared_mask_kwargs = dict(
2015 m_block=(self.q_stage * m_block + stage) * self.cta_group_size,
2016 thr_mma=thr_mma_qk,
2017 thr_tmem_load=thr_tmem_load,
2018 mask_causal=self.is_causal,
2019 mask_local=self.is_local,
2020 batch_idx=batch_idx,
2021 head_idx=head_idx,
2022 aux_tensors=aux_tensors,
2023 )
2024
2025 # Recompute fastdiv_mods if necessary
2026 recompute_fastdiv_mods_q = cutlass.const_expr(
2027 aux_tensors is not None
2028 and (seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q or seqlen.has_seqused_q)
2029 )
2030 recompute_fastdiv_mods_k = cutlass.const_expr(
2031 aux_tensors is not None
2032 and (seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k or seqlen.has_seqused_k)
2033 )
2034
2035 if cutlass.const_expr(fastdiv_mods is not None):
2036 seqlen_q_divmod, seqlen_k_divmod = fastdiv_mods
2037 fastdiv_mods = (
2038 seqlen_q_divmod
2039 if not recompute_fastdiv_mods_q
2040 else FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen.seqlen_q),
2041 seqlen_k_divmod
2042 if not recompute_fastdiv_mods_k
2043 else FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen.seqlen_k),
2044 )
2045
2046 mask_mod = self.mask_mod if const_expr(self.mask_mod is not None) else None
2047 mask_fn = partial(
2048 mask.apply_mask_sm100,
2049 mask_mod=mask_mod,
2050 fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
2051 head_divmod=head_divmod,
2052 **shared_mask_kwargs,
2053 )
2054 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
2055 # Full blocks dont need mask_mod
2056 mask_fn_none = partial(
2057 mask.apply_mask_sm100,
2058 mask_mod=None,
2059 fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
2060 head_divmod=head_divmod,
2061 **shared_mask_kwargs,
2062 )
2063 else:
2064 mask_fn_none = None
2065
2066 softmax = SoftmaxSm100.create(
2067 softmax_scale_log2,
2068 rescale_threshold=8.0 if const_expr(self.q_dtype.width == 16) else 0.0,
2069 softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
2070 )
2071 softmax.reset()
2072
2073 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
2074 tile_block_count = get_total_block_count(
2075 blocksparse_tensors,
2076 batch_idx,
2077 head_idx,
2078 m_block,
2079 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
2080 self.q_subtile_factor if self.q_subtile_factor is not None else 1,
2081 )
2082 has_work = tile_block_count > Int32(0)
2083 else:
2084 tile_block_count = n_block_max - n_block_min
2085 has_work = const_expr(not self.is_split_kv) or tile_block_count > Int32(
2086 0
2087 )
2088
2089 softmax_step = partial(
2090 self.softmax_step,
2091 softmax=softmax,
2092 thr_mma_qk=thr_mma_qk,
2093 pipeline_s_p_o=pipeline_s_p_o,
2094 pipeline_p_lastsplit=pipeline_p_lastsplit,
2095 pipeline_sm_stats=pipeline_sm_stats,
2096 sm_stats_barrier=sm_stats_barrier,
2097 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence=pipeline_s0_s1_sequence,
2098 thr_tmem_load=thr_tmem_load,
2099 thr_tmem_store=thr_tmem_store,
2100 thr_tmem_store_scale=thr_tmem_store_scale,
2101 tStS_t2r=tStS_t2r,
2102 tStScale_r2t=tStScale_r2t,
2103 tStP_r2t=tStP_r2t,
2104 sScale=sScale,
2105 stage=stage,
2106 batch_idx=batch_idx,
2107 head_idx=head_idx,
2108 m_block=(self.q_stage * m_block + stage) * self.cta_group_size,
2109 seqlen=seqlen,
2110 aux_tensors=aux_tensors,
2111 fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
2112 head_divmod=head_divmod,
2113 )
2114
2115 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity) or has_work:
2116 # See block_sparse_utils.py NOTE [SM100 block-sparse empty tiles: mbarrier contract].
2117 pipeline_sm_stats.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
2118 stage, sm_stats_producer_phase
2119 )
2120 sm_stats_producer_phase ^= 1
2121
2122 # Block sparse or dense iteration
2123 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
2124 # When aux_tensors exist, Q indices beyond seqlen_q must be wrapped to avoid
2125 # OOB aux_tensor access. Only edge tiles (where m_tile_end > seqlen_q) need this.
2126 if const_expr(aux_tensors is not None):
2127 m_tile_end = (
2128 (self.q_stage * m_block + stage + 1) * self.cta_group_size
2129 ) * self.m_block_size
2130 check_m_boundary = m_tile_end > seqlen.seqlen_q
2131 else:
2132 check_m_boundary = False
2133 (
2134 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2135 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2136 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2137 empty_tile,
2138 ) = softmax_block_sparse_sm100(
2139 blocksparse_tensors,
2140 batch_idx,
2141 head_idx,
2142 m_block,
2143 softmax_step,
2144 mask_fn,
2145 mask_fn_none,
2146 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2147 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2148 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2149 pipeline_sm_stats,
2150 sm_stats_barrier,
2151 self.q_stage,
2152 Int32(stage),
2153 check_m_boundary,
2154 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
2155 self.q_subtile_factor if self.q_subtile_factor is not None else 1,
2156 )
2157 if not empty_tile:
2158 sScale[tidx + stage * self.m_block_size] = softmax.row_sum[0]
2159 if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None):
2160 sScale[
2161 tidx
2162 + stage * self.m_block_size
2163 + self.q_stage * self.m_block_size
2164 ] = softmax.row_max[0]
2165 # if tidx == 0:
2166 # cute.printf("softmax row sum stage %d: %f, row_max = %f\n", stage, softmax.row_sum[0], softmax.row_max[0])
2167 # See block_sparse_utils.py NOTE [SM100 block-sparse empty tiles: mbarrier contract].
2168 # pipeline_sm_stats.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
2169 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_w_index(index=stage * 4 + warp_idx)
2170 # if tidx == 0: cute.printf("softmax row sum stage %d: %f\n", stage, softmax.row_sum[0])
2171 else:
2172 if const_expr(not self.is_split_kv) or tile_block_count > Int32(0):
2173 (
2174 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2175 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2176 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2177 ) = softmax_step(
2178 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2179 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2180 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2181 n_block_max - 1,
2182 is_first=True,
2183 mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=True),
2184 )
2185 n_block_max -= 1
2186 # Next couple of iterations with causal masking
2187 if const_expr(self.is_causal or self.is_local):
2188 n_block_min_causal_local_mask = (
2189 block_info.get_n_block_min_causal_local_mask(
2190 seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
2191 )
2192 )
2193 for n_tile in cutlass.range(
2194 n_block_max - n_block_min_causal_local_mask, unroll=1
2195 ):
2196 n_block = n_block_max - 1 - n_tile
2197 (
2198 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2199 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2200 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2201 ) = softmax_step(
2202 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2203 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2204 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2205 n_block,
2206 mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False),
2207 )
2208 n_block_max = cutlass.min(
2209 n_block_max, n_block_min_causal_local_mask
2210 )
2211 # The remaining iterations have no masking (but may still need mask_mod)
2212 n_block_min_before_local_mask = (
2213 block_info.get_n_block_min_before_local_mask(
2214 seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
2215 )
2216 )
2217 for n_tile in cutlass.range(
2218 n_block_max - n_block_min_before_local_mask, unroll=1
2219 ):
2220 n_block = n_block_max - n_tile - 1
2221 if const_expr(self.mask_mod is not None):
2222 (
2223 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2224 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2225 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2226 ) = softmax_step(
2227 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2228 sm_stats_producer_phase,
