2229 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2230 n_block,
2231 mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False),
2232 )
2233 else:
2234 (
2235 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2236 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2237 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2238 ) = softmax_step(
2239 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2240 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2241 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2242 n_block,
2243 )
2244 # Separate iterations with local masking on the left
2245 if const_expr(
2246 self.is_local and block_info.window_size_left is not None
2247 ):
2248 n_block_max = cutlass.min(
2249 n_block_max, n_block_min_before_local_mask
2250 )
2251 for n_tile in cutlass.range(
2252 0, n_block_max - n_block_min, unroll=1
2253 ):
2254 n_block = n_block_max - 1 - n_tile
2255 (
2256 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2257 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2258 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2259 ) = softmax_step(
2260 mma_si_consumer_phase,
2261 sm_stats_producer_phase,
2262 s0_s1_sequence_phase,
2263 n_block,
2264 mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False),
2265 )
2266 # Now that we no longer already have the 1st iteration, need mask_seqlen=True here
2267
2268 # Dense path always writes scale / signals
2269 sScale[tidx + stage * self.m_block_size] = softmax.row_sum[0]
2270 if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None):
2271 sScale[
2272 tidx
2273 + stage * self.m_block_size
2274 + self.q_stage * self.m_block_size
2275 ] = softmax.row_max[0]
2276 # pipeline_sm_stats.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
2277 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_w_index(index=stage * 4 + warp_idx)
2278
2279 # # Write LSE to gmem
2280 # if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
2281 # acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan = softmax.row_sum[0] == 0.0 or softmax.row_sum[0] != softmax.row_sum[0]
2282 # scale = (
2283 # cute.arch.rcp_approx(softmax.row_sum[0] if not acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan else 1.0)
2284 # )
2285 # LN2 = math.log(2.0)
2286 # lse = (
2287 # (softmax.row_max[0] * softmax.scale_log2 + cute.math.log2(softmax.row_sum[0], fastmath=True)) * LN2
2288 # if not acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan else -Float32.inf
2289 # )
2290 # if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
2291 # mLSE_cur = mLSE[None, head_idx, batch_idx]
2292 # else:
2293 # mLSE_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_q,), mLSE[None, head_idx])
2294 # gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.m_block_size,), (m_block * 2 + stage,))
2295 # if tidx < seqlen.seqlen_q - (m_block * 2 + stage) * self.m_block_size:
2296 # gLSE[tidx] = lse
2297
2298 # Advance to next tile
2299 tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
2300 work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
2301 # End of persistent scheduler loop
2302
2303 # This is equivalent to pipeline_sm_stats.producer_tail
2304 pipeline_sm_stats.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(stage, sm_stats_producer_phase)
2305 # This is equivalent to pipeline_s0_s1.producer_tail
2306 if const_expr(self.s0_s1_barrier):
2307 if stage == 0:
2308 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence.sync_object_full.wait(
2309 stage, s0_s1_sequence_phase
2310 )
2311
2312 @cute.jit
2313 def softmax_step(
2314 self,
2315 mma_si_consumer_phase: Int32,
2316 sm_stats_producer_phase: Int32,
2317 s0_s1_sequence_phase: Int32,
2318 n_block: Int32,
2319 softmax: SoftmaxSm100,
2320 thr_mma_qk: cute.core.ThrMma,
2321 pipeline_s_p_o: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2322 pipeline_p_lastsplit: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2323 pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2324 sm_stats_barrier: pipeline.NamedBarrier,
2325 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
2326 thr_tmem_load: cute.CopyAtom,
2327 thr_tmem_store: cute.CopyAtom,
2328 thr_tmem_store_scale: cute.CopyAtom,
2329 tStS_t2r: cute.Tensor,
2330 tStScale_r2t: cute.Tensor,
2331 tStP_r2t: cute.Tensor,
2332 sScale: cute.Tensor,
2333 stage: int | Int32,
2334 batch_idx: Int32,
2335 head_idx: Int32,
2336 m_block: Int32,
2337 seqlen,
2338 aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
2339 fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
2340 head_divmod=None,
2341 mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
2342 is_first: bool = False,
2343 ) -> Tuple[cute.Int32, cute.Int32, cute.Int32]:
2344 """Perform a single step of the softmax computation on a block of attention scores.
2345
2346 This method processes one block of the attention matrix, computing numerically stable
2347 softmax by first finding the row maximum, subtracting it from all elements, applying
2348 exponential function, and then normalizing by the sum of exponentials. It also handles
2349 optional masking of attention scores.
2350
2351 The method involves several key operations:
2352 1. Loading attention scores from tensor memory
2353 2. Applying optional masking based on position
2354 3. Computing row-wise maximum values for numerical stability
2355 4. Transforming scores using exp2(x*scale - max*scale)
2356 5. Computing row sums for normalization
2357 6. Coordinating pipeline synchronization between different processing stages
2358 """
2359 tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % (
2360 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
2361 # * (len(self.softmax0_warp_ids) if stage == 0 else len(self.softmax1_warp_ids)
2362 * (len(self.softmax0_warp_ids))
2363 )
2364 bidx, bidy, bidz = cute.arch.block_idx()
2365
2366 warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
2367 tilePlikeFP32 = self.mma_tiler_qk[1] // Float32.width * self.v_dtype.width
2368 tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_qk[:2]))
2369 tScS = tScS[(None, None), 0, 0] # (128, 128)
2370 # tScScale = cute.composition(tScS, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, 1)))
2371 cta_qk_tiler = (
2372 self.mma_tiler_qk[0] // thr_mma_qk.thr_id.shape,
2373 self.mma_tiler_qk[1],
2374 )
2375 tScS_shape = cta_qk_tiler # (128, 128)
2376 tScP_shape = (tScS_shape[0], tilePlikeFP32) # (128, 64)
2377
2378 # Wait for Si
2379 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, mma_si_consumer_phase)
2380 tSrS_t2r = cute.make_fragment(
2381 thr_tmem_load.partition_D(tScS).shape, self.qk_acc_dtype
2382 )
2383 cute.copy(thr_tmem_load, tStS_t2r, tSrS_t2r)
2384 # tSrS_t2r = copy_utils.load_t2r(thr_tmem_load, tScS_shape, tStS_t2r)
2385 if cutlass.const_expr(self.score_mod is not None):
2386 self.apply_score_mod(
2387 tSrS_t2r,
2388 thr_tmem_load,
2389 thr_mma_qk,
2390 batch_idx,
2391 head_idx,
2392 m_block,
2393 n_block,
2394 softmax,
2395 seqlen,
2396 aux_tensors,
2397 fastdiv_mods,
2398 head_divmod,
2399 )
2400
2401 if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
2402 mask_fn(tSrS_t2r, n_block=n_block)
2403 row_max, acc_scale = softmax.update_row_max(tSrS_t2r.load(), is_first)
2404
2405 if const_expr(not is_first):
2406 # tSrScale_r2t = cute.make_fragment(thr_tmem_store_scale.partition_S(tScScale).shape, Float32)
2407 # tSrScale_r2t[0] = acc_scale
2408 # cute.copy(thr_tmem_store_scale, tSrScale_r2t, tStScale_r2t)
2409 # cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_store()
2410 thread_idx = thr_tmem_load.thr_idx
2411 sScale[thread_idx + stage * self.m_block_size] = acc_scale
2412 # if thread_idx == 0: cute.printf("softmax acc_scale stage %d: %f, row_max = %f\n", stage, acc_scale, row_max)
2413 # Notify correction wg that row_max is ready
2414 # pipeline_sm_stats.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
2415 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_w_index(index=stage * 4 + warp_idx)
2416
2417 # if thread_idx == 0 and stage == 0: cute.print_tensor(tSrS_t2r)
2418 softmax.scale_subtract_rowmax(tSrS_t2r, row_max)
2419 # Sequence barrier wait
2420 if const_expr(self.s0_s1_barrier):
2421 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence.sync_object_full.wait(stage, s0_s1_sequence_phase)
2422 tSrP_r2t_f32 = cute.make_fragment(
2423 thr_tmem_store.partition_S(cute.make_identity_tensor(tScP_shape)).shape,
2424 Float32,
2425 )
2426 tSrP_r2t = cute.make_tensor(
2427 cute.recast_ptr(tSrP_r2t_f32.iterator, dtype=self.q_dtype), tSrS_t2r.layout
2428 )
2429 # softmax.scale_apply_exp2_convert(tSrS_t2r, row_max, tSrP_r2t)
2430 softmax.apply_exp2_convert(
2431 tSrS_t2r,
2432 tSrP_r2t,
2433 ex2_emu_freq=self.ex2_emu_freq if const_expr(mask_fn is None) else 0,
2434 ex2_emu_start_frg=self.ex2_emu_start_frg,
2435 )
2436 # Sequence barrier arrive
2437 if const_expr(self.s0_s1_barrier):
2438 pipeline_s0_s1_sequence.sync_object_full.arrive(1 - stage, dst=None)
2439 # print(tSrP_r2t_f32, tStP_r2t)
2440 # cute.copy(thr_tmem_store, tSrP_r2t_f32, tStP_r2t)
2441 for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tStP_r2t.shape[2])):
2442 cute.copy(
2443 thr_tmem_store, tSrP_r2t_f32[None, None, i], tStP_r2t[None, None, i]
2444 )
2445 if const_expr(self.split_P_arrive > 0):
2446 split_P_arrive_idx = (
2447 cute.size(tStP_r2t.shape[2])
2448 * self.split_P_arrive
2449 // self.n_block_size
2450 )
2451 if const_expr(i + 1 == split_P_arrive_idx):
2452 # Notify mma warp that the 1st half of P is ready
2453 cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_store()
2454 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2455 # Notify mma warp that the 2nd half of P is ready
2456 cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_store()
2457 if const_expr(self.split_P_arrive > 0):
2458 cute.arch.sync_warp()
2459 with cute.arch.elect_one():
2460 pipeline_p_lastsplit.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
2461 else:
2462 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2463 pipeline_sm_stats.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(stage, sm_stats_producer_phase)
2464 softmax.update_row_sum(tSrS_t2r.load(), acc_scale, is_first)
2465 # acc_scale = cute.math.exp2(acc_scale_, fastmath=True)
2466 return (
2467 mma_si_consumer_phase ^ 1,
2468 sm_stats_producer_phase ^ 1,
2469 s0_s1_sequence_phase ^ 1,
2470 )
2471
2472 @cute.jit
2473 def correction_loop(
2474 self,
2475 thr_mma_qk: cute.core.ThrMma,
2476 thr_mma_pv: cute.core.ThrMma,
2477 tStS: cute.Tensor,
2478 tOtO: cute.Tensor,
2479 sScale: cute.Tensor,
2480 mO: cute.Tensor,
2481 mLSE: cute.Tensor,
2482 sO: cute.Tensor,
2483 pipeline_s_p_o: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2484 pipeline_o_acc: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2485 pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2486 sm_stats_barrier: pipeline.NamedBarrier,
2487 pipeline_o_epi: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2488 learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2489 gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
2490 tma_atom_O: cute.CopyAtom,
2491 softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
2492 block_info: BlockInfo,
2493 num_splits: Int32,
2494 SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
2495 TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
2496 blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
2497 ):
2498 tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % (
2499 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.correction_warp_ids)
2500 )
2501 warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
2502 bidx, bidy, bidz = cute.arch.block_idx()
2503 mma_tile_coord_v = thr_mma_qk.thr_idx
2504
2505 tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_qk[:2]))
2506 tStScale_layout = cute.composition(
2507 tStS.layout, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, 1))
2508 )
2509 tStScales = tuple(
2510 cute.make_tensor(
2511 tStS.iterator + self.tmem_vec_offset[stage], tStScale_layout
2512 )
2513 for stage in range(self.q_stage)
2514 )
2515 tScScale = cute.composition(tScS, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, 1)))
2516 tmem_load_v_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
2517 tcgen05.copy.Ld32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(1)), self.qk_acc_dtype
2518 )
2519 thr_tmem_load_vec = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(
2520 tmem_load_v_atom, tStScales[0]
2521 ).get_slice(tidx)
2522
2523 tStScales_t2r = [
2524 thr_tmem_load_vec.partition_S(tStScales[stage])
2525 for stage in range(self.q_stage)
2526 ]
2527 tSrScale_t2r_shape = thr_tmem_load_vec.partition_D(tScScale).shape
2528
2529 # First iter: no correction is required
2530 # Notify mma warp that O has been rescaled
2531 for stage in cutlass.range(self.q_stage):
2532 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2533
2534 sm_stats_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
2535 o_corr_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
2536 corr_epi_producer_phase = Int32(1)
2537
2538 tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
2539 work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
2540 while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
2541 m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx = work_tile.tile_idx
2542 seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
2543 n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
2544 seqlen, m_block, split_idx, num_splits
2545 )
2546
2547 if const_expr(self.is_split_kv):
2548 mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3)[
2549 None, None, head_idx, split_idx
2550 ]
2551 else:
2552 mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3)[
2553 None, None, head_idx
2554 ]
2555 tiler_gO = ((self.mma_tiler_pv[0] * self.q_stage), self.head_dim_v_padded)
2556 gO = cute.local_tile(mO_cur, tiler_gO, (m_block, 0)) # (128 * 2, 128)
2557 gO = layout_utils.select(
2558 cute.flat_divide(gO, (self.mma_tiler_pv[0],)), mode=[0, 2, 1]
2559 ) # (128, 128, 2)
2560 gO = cute.flat_divide(gO, (self.mma_tiler_pv[0] // self.cta_group_size,))[
2561 None, mma_tile_coord_v, None, None
2562 ]
2563
2564 # Default LSE to -inf for invalid split_idx tiles
2565 stats = [
2566 (
2567 0.0,
2568 -Float32.inf
2569 if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None)
2570 else None,
2571 True,
2572 )
2573 ] * self.q_stage
2574
2575 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
2576 total_block_count = get_total_block_count(
2577 blocksparse_tensors,
2578 batch_idx,
2579 head_idx,
2580 m_block,
2581 self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
2582 self.q_subtile_factor if self.q_subtile_factor is not None else 1,
2583 )
2584 has_work = total_block_count > Int32(0)
2585 else:
2586 total_block_count = n_block_max - n_block_min
2587 has_work = const_expr(
2588 not self.is_split_kv
2589 ) or total_block_count > Int32(0)
2590
2591 if has_work:
2592 # Ignore first signal from softmax as no correction is required
2593 # pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(0, sm_stats_consumer_phase)
2594 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_and_wait_w_index(index=0 * 4 + warp_idx)
2595 pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release_w_index(0)
2596 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 2):
2597 # pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(1, sm_stats_consumer_phase)
2598 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_and_wait_w_index(index=1 * 4 + warp_idx)
2599 sm_stats_consumer_phase ^= 1
2600
2601 tSrScale_t2r = cute.make_fragment(tSrScale_t2r_shape, Float32)
2602 for i in cutlass.range(total_block_count - 1, unroll=1):
2603 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
2604 # wait for S0 / S1
2605 # pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, sm_stats_consumer_phase)
2606 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_and_wait_w_index(
2607 index=stage * 4 + warp_idx
2608 )
2609 # cute.copy(tiled_tmem_load_vec, tStScales_t2r[stage], tSrScale_t2r)
2610 # cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_load()
2611 # scale = tSrScale_t2r[0]
2612 scale = sScale[tidx + stage * self.m_block_size]
2613 should_rescale = cute.arch.vote_ballot_sync(scale < 1.0) != 0
2614 # should_rescale = True
2615 # Don't need O_full anymore, since by the time softmax has signaled the correction
2616 # warps, S_i must have been done, so O_i-1 must have been done as well.
2617 # pipeline_o_acc.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, o_corr_consumer_phase)
2618 if should_rescale:
2619 self.correction_rescale(
2620 thr_mma_pv, tOtO[None, None, None, stage], tidx, scale
2621 )
2622 # Notify mma warp that O has been rescaled
2623 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2624 pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release_w_index(
2625 self.q_stage - 1 - stage
2626 )
2627 sm_stats_consumer_phase ^= 1
2628 # o_corr_consumer_phase ^= 1
2629 if const_expr(self.q_stage == 2):
2630 pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release_w_index(1)
2631 # End of seqlen_corr_loop_steps
2632
2633 # Even in the case of self.overlap_sO_sQ, we can write to stage 0 of sO without
2634 # additional sync because the MMA in the top half must have been done.
2635 # Similarly we can write to stage 1 of sO without additional sync.
2636 learnable_sink_val = [None] * self.q_stage
2637 if const_expr(learnable_sink is not None):
2638 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
2639 sink_val = Float32(learnable_sink[head_idx])
2640 learnable_sink_val = [sink_val] * self.q_stage
2641 else: # Each thread might have a different sink value due to different q_head
2642 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
2643 q_head_idx = (
2644 (
2645 (m_block * self.q_stage + stage)
2646 * self.cta_group_size
2647 + mma_tile_coord_v
2648 )
2649 * self.m_block_size
2650 + tidx
2651 ) % self.qhead_per_kvhead + head_idx * self.qhead_per_kvhead
2652 learnable_sink_val[stage] = Float32(
2653 learnable_sink[q_head_idx]
2654 )
2655 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
2656 # pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, sm_stats_consumer_phase)
2657 sm_stats_barrier.arrive_and_wait_w_index(index=stage * 4 + warp_idx)
2658 # cute.copy(tiled_tmem_load_vec, tStScales_t2r[stage], tSrScale_t2r)
2659 # cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_load()
2660 # scale = tSrScale_t2r[0]
2661 row_sum = sScale[tidx + stage * self.m_block_size]
2662 if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None):
2663 row_max = sScale[
2664 tidx
2665 + stage * self.m_block_size
2666 + self.q_stage * self.m_block_size
2667 ]
2668 else:
2669 row_max = None
2670 pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2671 if const_expr(learnable_sink is not None):
2672 LOG2_E = math.log2(math.e)
2673 sink_val = learnable_sink_val[stage]
2674 if const_expr(not self.is_split_kv) or split_idx == 0:
2675 if row_max == -Float32.inf:
2676 # It's possible to have an empty row with splitKV.
2677 row_max = sink_val * (LOG2_E / softmax_scale_log2)
2678 row_sum = Float32(1.0)
2679 else:
2680 row_sum += cute.math.exp2(
2681 sink_val * LOG2_E - row_max * softmax_scale_log2,
2682 fastmath=True,
2683 )
2684 acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan = row_sum == 0.0 or row_sum != row_sum
2685 stats[stage] = (row_sum, row_max, acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan)
2686 scale = cute.arch.rcp_approx(
2687 row_sum if not acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan else 1.0
2688 )
2689 # Wait for the last O to be ready from the MMA warp
2690 pipeline_o_acc.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(
2691 stage, o_corr_consumer_phase
2692 )
2693 if const_expr(not self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
2694 pipeline_o_epi.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
2695 stage, corr_epi_producer_phase
2696 )
2697 self.correction_epilogue(
2698 thr_mma_pv,
2699 tOtO[None, None, None, stage],
2700 tidx,
2701 stage,
2702 m_block,
2703 seqlen.seqlen_q,
2704 scale,
2705 sO[None, None, stage],
2706 mO_cur,
2707 gO[None, None, stage],
2708 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
2709 )
2710 # Signal for the next work tile that O buffers in tmem are already read, so
2711 # mma warp can write to them
2712 pipeline_s_p_o.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
2713 if const_expr(not self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
2714 pipeline_o_epi.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
2715 # if tidx == 0: cute.printf("Correction final scale for stage %d: %f\n", stage, scale)
2716
2717 o_corr_consumer_phase ^= 1
2718 sm_stats_consumer_phase ^= 1
2719 corr_epi_producer_phase ^= 1
2720 else:
2721 gmem_tiled_copy_O_for_empty_tile = None
2722 if const_expr(self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
2723 gmem_tiled_copy_O_for_empty_tile = gmem_tiled_copy_O
2724 if const_expr(self.use_block_sparsity):
2725 (
2726 sm_stats_consumer_phase,
2727 o_corr_consumer_phase,
2728 corr_epi_producer_phase,
2729 ) = handle_block_sparse_empty_tile_correction_sm100(
2730 tidx,
2731 self.q_stage,
2732 self.m_block_size,
2733 self.qhead_per_kvhead,
2734 self.pack_gqa,
2735 self.is_split_kv,
2736 learnable_sink,
2737 mLSE,
2738 seqlen,
2739 m_block,
2740 head_idx,
2741 batch_idx,
2742 split_idx,
2743 sScale,
2744 stats,
2745 self.correction_epilogue,
2746 thr_mma_pv,
2747 tOtO,
2748 sO,
2749 pipeline_sm_stats,
2750 sm_stats_barrier,
2751 pipeline_o_epi,
2752 sm_stats_consumer_phase,
2753 o_corr_consumer_phase,
2754 corr_epi_producer_phase,
2755 softmax_scale_log2,
2756 mO_cur,
2757 gO,
2758 gmem_tiled_copy_O_for_empty_tile,
2759 )
2760
2761 if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
2762 if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
2763 if const_expr(self.is_split_kv):
2764 mLSE_cur = mLSE[None, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx]
2765 else:
2766 mLSE_cur = mLSE[None, head_idx, batch_idx]
2767 else:
2768 offset = (
2769 seqlen.offset_q
2770 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa)
2771 else (0, seqlen.offset_q)
2772 )
2773 if const_expr(self.is_split_kv):
2774 mLSE_cur = cute.domain_offset(
2775 (offset,), mLSE[None, head_idx, split_idx]
2776 )
2777 else:
2778 mLSE_cur = cute.domain_offset((offset,), mLSE[None, head_idx])
2779 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
2780 m_tile_idx = (
2781 m_block * self.q_stage + stage
2782 ) * self.cta_group_size + mma_tile_coord_v
2783 gLSE = cute.local_tile(
2784 mLSE_cur, (self.m_block_size,), (m_tile_idx,)
2785 )
2786 row_sum, row_max, acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan = stats[stage]
2787 # if tidx == 0 and stage <= 1:
2788 # cute.printf("row_sum = {}, row_max = {}, acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan = {}\n", row_sum, row_max, acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan)
2789 LN2 = math.log(2.0)
2790 lse = (
2791 (
2792 row_max * softmax_scale_log2
2793 + cute.math.log2(row_sum, fastmath=True)
2794 )
2795 * LN2
2796 if not acc_O_mn_row_is_zero_or_nan
2797 else -Float32.inf
2798 )
2799 seqlen_q = (
2800 seqlen.seqlen_q
2801 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa)
2802 else seqlen.seqlen_q * self.qhead_per_kvhead
2803 )
2804 if tidx < seqlen_q - m_tile_idx * self.m_block_size:
2805 # This actually just works with PackGQA too
2806 gLSE[tidx] = lse
2807
2808 # Advance to next tile
2809 tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
2810 work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
2811 # End of persistent scheduler loop
2812
2813 # This is equivalent to pipeline_o_epi.consumer_tail() for the correction warps
2814 if const_expr(not self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
2815 pipeline_o_epi.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(
2816 self.q_stage - 1, corr_epi_producer_phase
2817 )
2818
2819 @cute.jit
2820 def correction_rescale(
2821 self,
2822 thr_mma: cute.core.ThrMma,
2823 tOtO: cute.Tensor,
2824 tidx: Int32,
2825 scale: Float32,
2826 ):
2827 """Rescale intermediate attention results based on softmax normalization factor.
2828
2829 This method performs a crucial correction step in the attention computation pipeline.
2830 When processing attention in blocks, the softmax normalization factors may change
2831 as new blocks are processed. This method rescales previously computed partial
2832 output values to account for updated normalization factors.
2833
2834 The implementation uses efficient tensor memory operations to:
2835 1. Load existing partial attention output from tensor memory
2836 2. Apply the scaling factor to all elements
2837 3. Store the rescaled results back to tensor memory
2838 """
2839 tOcO = thr_mma.partition_C(cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_pv[:2]))
2840 corr_tile_size = 16 # tuneable parameter
2841 tmem_load_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
2842 tcgen05.copy.Ld32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(corr_tile_size)),
2843 self.pv_acc_dtype,
2844 )
2845 tmem_store_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
2846 tcgen05.copy.St32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(corr_tile_size)),
2847 self.pv_acc_dtype,
2848 )
2849 tOtO_i = cute.composition(
2850 tOtO, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, corr_tile_size))
2851 )
2852 tOcO_i = cute.composition(
2853 tOcO, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, corr_tile_size))
2854 )
2855 thr_tmem_load = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_load_atom, tOtO_i).get_slice(tidx)
2856 thr_tmem_store = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_store_atom, tOtO_i).get_slice(tidx)
2857 tOtO_t2r = thr_tmem_load.partition_S(tOtO_i)
2858 tOrO_t2r_shape = thr_tmem_load.partition_D(tOcO_i).shape
2859 tOtO_r2t = thr_tmem_store.partition_D(tOtO_i)
2860
2861 frg_count = self.head_dim_v_padded // corr_tile_size
2862 tOrO_frg = cute.make_fragment((tOrO_t2r_shape, frg_count), self.pv_acc_dtype)
2863 for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(frg_count):
2864 tOrO_frg = cute.make_fragment(tOrO_t2r_shape, self.pv_acc_dtype)
2865 tOtO_t2r_i = cute.make_tensor(
2866 tOtO_t2r.iterator + i * corr_tile_size, tOtO_t2r.layout
2867 )
2868 cute.copy(thr_tmem_load, tOtO_t2r_i, tOrO_frg)
2869 for j in cutlass.range(0, cute.size(tOrO_frg), 2, unroll_full=True):
2870 tOrO_frg[j], tOrO_frg[j + 1] = cute.arch.mul_packed_f32x2(
2871 (tOrO_frg[j], tOrO_frg[j + 1]), (scale, scale)
2872 )
2873 tOtO_r2t_i = cute.make_tensor(
2874 tOtO_r2t.iterator + i * corr_tile_size, tOtO_r2t.layout
2875 )
2876 cute.copy(thr_tmem_store, tOrO_frg, tOtO_r2t_i)
2877 cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_store()
2878
2879 @cute.jit
2880 def correction_epilogue(
2881 self,
2882 thr_mma: cute.core.ThrMma,
2883 tOtO: cute.Tensor,
2884 tidx: Int32,
2885 stage: Int32,
2886 m_block: Int32,
2887 seqlen_q: Int32,
2888 scale: Float32,
2889 sO: cute.Tensor,
2890 mO_cur: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2891 gO: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2892 gmem_tiled_copy_O: Optional[cute.TiledCopy] = None,
2893 ):
2894 """Apply final scaling and transformation to attention output before writing to global memory.
2895
2896 This correction_epilogue function handles the final processing step for attention output values.
2897 It applies a scaling factor to the accumulated attention results and prepares the
2898 data for efficient transfer back to global memory.
2899
2900 The method performs:
2901 1. Loading of accumulated attention results from tensor memory
2902 2. Application of the final output scaling factor
2903 3. Type conversion if necessary (typically from higher precision accumulator to output precision)
2904 4. Reorganization of data for optimal memory access patterns
2905 5. Preparation for efficient TMA store operations
2906
2907 :param thr_mma: Thread MMA operation for the computation
2908 :type thr_mma: cute.core.ThrMma
2909 :param tOtO: Tensor containing accumulated attention output
2910 :type tOtO: cute.Tensor
2911 :param scale: Final scaling factor to apply to the output
2912 :type scale: Float32
2913 :param sO: Shared memory tensor for the final output
2914 :type sO: cute.Tensor
2915 """
2916
2917 corr_tile_size = 8 * 32 // self.o_dtype.width
2918 # Use CTA 0 mapping for smem partitioning since sO is per-CTA sized
2919 tOsO = thr_mma.get_slice(0).partition_C(sO)
2920 tOcO = thr_mma.partition_C(cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_pv[:2]))
2921
2922 tOtO_i = cute.logical_divide(
2923 tOtO, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, corr_tile_size))
2924 )
2925 tOcO_i = cute.logical_divide(
2926 tOcO, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, corr_tile_size))
2927 )
2928 tOsO_i = cute.logical_divide(
2929 tOsO, cute.make_layout((self.m_block_size, corr_tile_size))
2930 )
2931
2932 epi_subtile = (self.epi_tile[0], corr_tile_size)
2933 tmem_copy_atom = sm100_utils_basic.get_tmem_load_op(
2934 self.mma_tiler_pv,
2935 self.o_layout,
2936 self.o_dtype,
2937 self.pv_acc_dtype,
2938 epi_subtile,
2939 use_2cta_instrs=self.use_2cta_instrs,
2940 )
2941 tiled_tmem_load = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(
2942 tmem_copy_atom, tOtO_i[(None, None), 0]
2943 )
2944 thr_tmem_load = tiled_tmem_load.get_slice(tidx)
2945 smem_copy_atom = sm100_utils_basic.get_smem_store_op(
2946 self.o_layout, self.o_dtype, self.pv_acc_dtype, tiled_tmem_load
2947 )
2948 tiled_smem_store = cute.make_tiled_copy_D(smem_copy_atom, tiled_tmem_load)
2949
2950 tOtO_t2r = thr_tmem_load.partition_S(tOtO_i[(None, None), None])
2951 tOsO_s2r = copy_utils.partition_D_position_independent(
2952 thr_tmem_load, tOsO_i[(None, None), None]
2953 )
2954 tOcO_t2r = thr_tmem_load.partition_D(tOcO_i[(None, None), None])
2955 for i in cutlass.range(
2956 self.head_dim_v_padded // corr_tile_size, unroll_full=True
2957 ):
2958 tOtO_t2r_i = tOtO_t2r[None, 0, 0, i]
2959 tOsO_r2s_i = tOsO_s2r[None, 0, 0, i]
2960 tOrO_frg = cute.make_fragment(
2961 tOcO_t2r[None, 0, 0, i].shape, self.pv_acc_dtype
2962 )
2963 cute.copy(tiled_tmem_load, tOtO_t2r_i, tOrO_frg)
2964 for j in cutlass.range(0, cute.size(tOrO_frg), 2, unroll_full=True):
2965 tOrO_frg[j], tOrO_frg[j + 1] = cute.arch.mul_packed_f32x2(
2966 (tOrO_frg[j], tOrO_frg[j + 1]), (scale, scale)
2967 )
2968 copy_utils.cvt_copy(tiled_smem_store, tOrO_frg, tOsO_r2s_i)
2969 cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
2970
2971 if const_expr(self.use_correction_warps_for_epi):
2972 assert not self.use_tma_O
2973 assert gmem_tiled_copy_O is not None
2974 cute.arch.barrier(
2975 barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
2976 number_of_threads=len(self.epilogue_warp_ids) * cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
2977 )
2978 mma_tile_coord_v = thr_mma.thr_idx
2979 m_tile_idx = (
2980 m_block * self.q_stage + stage
2981 ) * self.cta_group_size + mma_tile_coord_v
2982 self._store_O_to_gmem(
2983 sO, gO, mO_cur, gmem_tiled_copy_O, tidx, seqlen_q, m_tile_idx
2984 )
2985
2986 @cute.jit
2987 def _store_O_to_gmem(
2988 self,
2989 sO_stage: cute.Tensor,
2990 gO: cute.Tensor,
2991 mO_cur: cute.Tensor,
2992 gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
2993 tidx: Int32,
2994 seqlen_q: Int32,
2995 m_tile_idx: Int32,
2996 ):
2997 """Copy a single stage of O from smem to gmem via registers."""
2998 gmem_thr_copy_O = gmem_tiled_copy_O.get_slice(tidx)
2999 tOsO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_S(sO_stage)
3000 cO = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded))
3001 tOgO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_D(gO)
3002 tOcO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_S(cO)
3003 t0OcO = gmem_tiled_copy_O.get_slice(0).partition_S(cO)
3004 tOpO = copy_utils.predicate_k(tOcO, limit=mO_cur.shape[1])
3005 pack_gqa = PackGQA(
3006 self.m_block_size,
3007 self.head_dim_v_padded,
3008 self.check_hdim_v_oob,
3009 self.qhead_per_kvhead,
3010 )
3011
3012 # load acc O from smem to rmem for wider vectorization
3013 tOrO = cute.make_fragment_like(tOsO, self.o_dtype)
3014 cute.autovec_copy(tOsO, tOrO)
3015 # copy acc O from rmem to gmem
3016 if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
3017 for rest_m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tOrO.shape[1])):
3018 if (
3019 t0OcO[0, rest_m, 0][0]
3020 < seqlen_q - m_tile_idx * self.m_block_size - tOcO[0][0]
3021 ):
3022 cute.copy(
3023 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
3024 tOrO[None, rest_m, None],
3025 tOgO[None, rest_m, None],
3026 pred=tOpO[None, rest_m, None]
3027 if const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob)
3028 else None,
3029 )
3030 else:
3031 pack_gqa.store_O(
3032 mO_cur, tOrO, gmem_tiled_copy_O, tidx, m_tile_idx, seqlen_q
3033 )
3034
3035 @cute.jit
3036 def epilogue_s2g(
3037 self,
3038 mO: cute.Tensor,
3039 sO: cute.Tensor,
3040 gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
3041 tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
3042 pipeline_o_epi: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
3043 block_info: BlockInfo,
3044 num_splits: int,
3045 SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
3046 TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
3047 mma_tile_coord_v: Int32 = 0,
3048 ):
3049 epi_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
3050 tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
3051 work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
3052 while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
3053 m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, split_idx = work_tile.tile_idx
3054 seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
3055 n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
3056 seqlen, m_block, split_idx, num_splits
3057 )
3058
3059 if const_expr(not self.is_split_kv) or n_block_min < n_block_max:
3060 if const_expr(self.is_split_kv):
3061 mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3)[
3062 None, None, head_idx, split_idx
3063 ]
3064 else:
3065 mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3)[
3066 None, None, head_idx
3067 ]
3068 tiler_gO = (
3069 (self.mma_tiler_pv[0] * self.q_stage),
3070 self.head_dim_v_padded,
3071 )
3072 gO = cute.local_tile(mO_cur, tiler_gO, (m_block, 0)) # (128 * 2, 128)
3073 gO = layout_utils.select(
3074 cute.flat_divide(gO, (self.mma_tiler_pv[0],)), mode=[0, 2, 1]
3075 ) # (128, 128, 2)
3076 gO = cute.flat_divide(
3077 gO, (self.mma_tiler_pv[0] // self.cta_group_size,)
3078 )[None, mma_tile_coord_v, None, None]
3079
3080 if const_expr(self.use_tma_O):
3081 store_O, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
3082 tma_atom_O, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sO, gO
3083 )
3084 for stage in cutlass.range(self.q_stage, unroll_full=True):
3085 # wait from corr, issue tma store on smem
3086 # 1. wait for O0 / O1 final
3087 pipeline_o_epi.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(
3088 stage, epi_consumer_phase
3089 )
3090 # 2. copy O0 / O1 to gmem
3091 store_O(src_idx=stage, dst_idx=stage)
3092 cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
3093 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
3094 # Ensure O0 / O1 buffer is ready to be released
3095 cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(
3096 self.q_stage - 1 - stage, read=True
3097 )
3098 pipeline_o_epi.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
3099 else:
3100 tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % (
3101 cute.arch.WARP_SIZE * len(self.epilogue_warp_ids)
3102 )
3103 for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.q_stage):
3104 # wait from corr, issue tma store on smem
3105 # 1. wait for O0 / O1 final
3106 pipeline_o_epi.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(
3107 stage, epi_consumer_phase
3108 )
3109 # 2. copy O0 / O1 to gmem
3110 m_tile_idx = (
3111 m_block * self.q_stage + stage
3112 ) * self.cta_group_size + mma_tile_coord_v
3113 self._store_O_to_gmem(
3114 sO[None, None, stage],
3115 gO[None, None, stage],
3116 mO_cur,
3117 gmem_tiled_copy_O,
3118 tidx,
3119 seqlen.seqlen_q,
3120 m_tile_idx,
3121 )
3122 pipeline_o_epi.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
3123
3124 epi_consumer_phase ^= 1
3125
3126 # Advance to next tile
3127 tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
3128 work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
3129
3130 def load_Q(
3131 self,
3132 load_Q_fn: Callable,
3133 pipeline_q: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
3134 block: Int32,
3135 stage: int,
3136 phase: Int32,
3137 ):
3138 pipeline_q.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(stage, phase)
3139 load_Q_fn(
3140 src_idx=block,
3141 dst_idx=stage,
3142 tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_q.sync_object_full.get_barrier(stage),
3143 )
3144
3145 @cute.jit
3146 def load_KV(
3147 self,
3148 tma_atom: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
3149 tXgX: Optional[cute.Tensor],
3150 tXsX: Optional[cute.Tensor],
3151 paged_kv_manager: Optional[PagedKVManager],
3152 sX: cute.Tensor,
3153 block: Int32,
3154 pipeline_kv: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
3155 producer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
3156 K_or_V: Literal["K", "V"],
3157 page_idx: Optional[Int32] = None,
3158 extra_tx_count: Optional[Int32] = None,
3159 ):
3160 assert K_or_V in ("K", "V")
3161 stage, phase = producer_state.index, producer_state.phase
3162 extra_tx_count_kv = self.tma_copy_bytes[K_or_V] - self.tma_copy_bytes["K"]
3163 extra_tx_count = (
3164 extra_tx_count_kv + (extra_tx_count if extra_tx_count is not None else 0)
3165 if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV)
3166 else None
3167 )
3168 extra_kwargs = (
3169 {"extra_tx_count": extra_tx_count} if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV) else {}
3170 )
3171 pipeline_kv.producer_acquire(producer_state, **extra_kwargs)
3172 if const_expr(K_or_V == "K" and self.uneven_kv_smem):
3173 # Before this round, the smem location was occupied by V, which is smaller than
3174 # K. So we need to wait for the stage after that (stage 1) to be empty as well.
3175 if stage == 0:
3176 pipeline_kv.sync_object_empty.wait(1, phase)
3177
3178 if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV):
3179 assert tXgX is not None and tXsX is not None and tma_atom is not None
3180 tXsX_cur = tXsX[None, stage]
3181 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
3182 # Since this is the producer_state, the phase starts at 1, so we have to invert it
3183 tXsX_cur = self.offset_kv_smem(tXsX_cur, stage, phase ^ 1)
3184 # Currently we assume that page_size == n_block_size so we index into tXgX with block = 0
3185 tXgX_cur = (
3186 tXgX[None, block]
3187 if const_expr(page_idx is None)
3188 else tXgX[None, 0, page_idx]
3189 )
3190 cute.copy(
3191 tma_atom,
3192 tXgX_cur,
3193 tXsX_cur,
3194 tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_kv.producer_get_barrier(producer_state),
3195 )
3196 else:
3197 assert paged_kv_manager is not None
3198 assert extra_tx_count is None
3199 paged_kv_manager.load_KV(block, sX[None, None, None, stage], K_or_V)
3200 cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
3201 pipeline_kv.sync_object_full.arrive_cp_async_mbarrier(stage)
3202
3203 @cute.jit
3204 def offset_kv_smem(self, sX: cute.Tensor, stage: Int32, phase: Int32):
3205 if const_expr(self.uneven_kv_smem):
3206 # smem layout is [smem_large, smem_small, smem_large], and the current stride is
3207 # (smem_large + smem_small) // 2. So for stage == 1, move right by offset if
3208 # phase == 0, or left by offset if phase == 1.
3209 offset = 0 if stage != 1 else self.uneven_kv_smem_offset * (1 - 2 * phase)
3210 return cute.make_tensor(sX.iterator + offset, sX.layout)
3211 else:
3212 return sX
3213
3214 # @cute.jit
3215 # def warp_scheduler_barrier_init(self):
3216 # warp_group_idx = utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False)
3217 # if warp_group_idx == 0:
3218 # cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
3219 # barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1), number_of_threads=2 * 128,
3220 # )
3221
3222 # def warp_scheduler_barrier_sync(self):
3223 # cute.arch.barrier(
3224 # barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1) + utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False),
3225 # number_of_threads=2 * 128
3226 # )
3227
3228 # def warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive(self):
3229 # cur_wg = utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False)
3230 # next_wg = 1 - cur_wg
3231 # cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
3232 # barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1) + next_wg, number_of_threads=2 * 128,
3233 # )
3234
3235 @cute.jit
3236 def apply_score_mod(
3237 self,
3238 tSrS_t2r,
3239 thr_tmem_load,
3240 thr_mma_qk,
3241 batch_idx,
3242 head_idx,
3243 m_block,
3244 n_block,
3245 softmax,
3246 seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
3247 aux_tensors=None,
3248 fastdiv_mods=(None, None),
3249 head_divmod=None,
3250 ):
3251 """Apply score modification for SM100 (constant q_idx)."""
3252 # Prepare index tensor with extra partition
3253 cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.m_block_size, self.n_block_size))
3254 cS = cute.domain_offset(
3255 (m_block * self.m_block_size, n_block * self.n_block_size), cS
3256 )
3257 tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS)
3258 tScS = tScS[(None, None), 0, 0]
3259 tScS_t2r = thr_tmem_load.partition_D(tScS)
3260
3261 # Shared q_idx for all scores
3262 q_idx_logical = tScS_t2r[0][0]
3263
3264 # For Pack-GQA, compute the logical head index for this tile
3265 if cutlass.const_expr(self.pack_gqa):
3266 assert head_divmod is not None
3267 # Building up the logical q_head idx: final_q_head = kv_head * qhead_per_kvhead + (q_physical % qhead_per_kvhead)
3268 q_physical = q_idx_logical
3269 q_idx_logical, head_offset = divmod(q_physical, head_divmod)
3270 head_idx = head_idx * self.qhead_per_kvhead + head_offset
3271
3272 if cutlass.const_expr(aux_tensors is not None):
3273 seqlen_q_divmod, _ = fastdiv_mods
3274 _, q_idx_logical = divmod(q_idx_logical, seqlen_q_divmod)
3275
3276 apply_score_mod_inner(
3277 tSrS_t2r,
3278 tScS_t2r,
3279 self.score_mod,
3280 batch_idx,
3281 head_idx,
3282 softmax.softmax_scale,
3283 self.vec_size,
3284 self.qk_acc_dtype,
3285 aux_tensors,
3286 fastdiv_mods,
3287 seqlen_info=seqlen,
3288 constant_q_idx=q_idx_logical,
3289 qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead
3290 if cutlass.const_expr(self.pack_gqa)
3291 else 1,
3292 )
